sql.NullFloat64\n384\t\t\t\tBreathAnomaly sql.NullBool\n385\t\t\t\tBreathSamples sql.NullString\n386\t\t\t\tPerson        sql.NullString\n387\t\t\t}\n388\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&r.Duration, &r.OnsetLatency, &r.Restlessness,\n389\t\t\t\t&r.BreathAvg, &r.BreathReg, &r.BreathAnomaly, &r.BreathSamples, &r.Person); err != nil {\n390\t\t\t\tcontinue\n391\t\t\t}\n392\t\t\tsleepRecords = append(sleepRecords, r)\n393\t\t}\n394\t\n395\t\tif len(sleepRecords) == 0 {\n396\t\t\treturn nil\n397\t\t}\n398\t\n399\t\t// For multi-person, aggregate or pick the primary record\n400\t\t// For now, use the first record\n401\t\tr := sleepRecords[0]\n402\t\n403\t\tvar parts []string\n404\t\tpersonName := \"You\"\n405\t\tif r.Person.Valid && r.Person.String != \"\" {\n406\t\t\tpersonName = r.Person.String\n407\t\t}\n408\t\n409\t\t// Duration and deviation from average\n410\t\tif r.Duration.Valid && r.Duration.Int32 > 0 {\n411\t\t\th := r.Duration.Int32 / 60\n412\t\t\tm := r.Duration.Int32 % 60\n413\t\t\tif m > 0 {\n414\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s slept %dh %dm\", personName, h, m))\n415\t\t\t} else {\n416\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s slept %dh\", personName, h))\n417\t\t\t}\n418\t\n419\t\t\t// Compare with average (get from recent records)\n420\t\t\tavgDuration := g.getAverageSleepDuration(r.Person.String)\n421\t\t\tif avgDuration > 0 {\n422\t\t\t\tdelta := int(r.Duration.Int32) - avgDuration\n423\t\t\t\tif math.Abs(float64(delta)) >= 10 {\n424\t\t\t\t\tif delta > 0 {\n425\t\t\t\t\t\tparts[len(parts)-1] += fmt.Sprintf(\" — %d minutes more than your average\", delta)\n426\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n427\t\t\t\t\t\tparts[len(parts)-1] += fmt.Sprintf(\" — %d minutes less than your average\", -delta)\n428\t\t\t\t\t}\n429\t\t\t\t}\n430\t\t\t}\n431\t\t} else {\n432\t\t\tparts = append(parts, personName+\" slept\")\n433\t\t}\n434\t\n435\t\t// Restlessness\n436\t\tif r.Restlessness.Valid {\n437\t\t\tswitch {\n438\t\t\tcase r.Restlessness.Float64 < 1:\n439\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Restlessness: Low.\")\n440\t\t\tcase r.Restlessness.Float64 < 3:\n441\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Restlessness: Moderate.\")\n442\t\t\tdefault:\n443\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Restlessness: High.\")\n444\t\t\t}\n445\t\t}\n446\t\n447\t\t// Breathing regularity\n448\t\tif r.BreathReg.Valid {\n449\t\t\tcv := r.BreathReg.Float64\n450\t\t\tswitch {\n451\t\t\tcase cv < 0.10:\n452\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Breathing: Regular.\")\n453\t\t\tcase cv > 0.25:\n454\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Breathing: Irregular.\")\n455\t\t\tdefault:\n456\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Breathing: Normal.\")\n457\t\t\t}\n458\t\t}\n459\t\n460\t\t// Breathing anomaly\n461\t\tif r.BreathAnomaly.Valid && r.BreathAnomaly.Bool {\n462\t\t\tif r.BreathSamples.Valid {\n463\t\t\t\tvar info map[string]interface{}\n464\t\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(r.BreathSamples.String), &info); err == nil {\n465\t\t\t\t\tavg, _ := info[\"avg\"].(float64)\n466\t\t\t\t\tpersonal, _ := info[\"personal_avg\"].(float64)\n467\t\t\t\t\tif personal > 0 {\n468\t\t\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Breathing rate elevated (%.0f bpm vs. %.0f bpm average).\",\n469\t\t\t\t\t\t\tavg, personal))\n470\t\t\t\t\t} else if avg > 0 {\n471\t\t\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Breathing rate elevated (%.0f bpm).\", avg))\n472\t\t\t\t\t}\n473\t\t\t\t}\n474\t\t\t}\n475\t\t}\n476\t\n477\t\tif len(parts) == 0 {\n478\t\t\treturn nil\n479\t\t}\n480\t\n481\t\treturn &Section{\n482\t\t\tType:     \"sleep\",\n483\t\t\tContent:  strings.Join(parts, \" \"),\n484\t\t\tPriority: 80,\n485\t\t}\n486\t}\n487\t\n488\t// generatePeopleBlock generates BLOCK 3 — Who is home.\n489\tfunc (g *Generator) generatePeopleBlock(person string) *Section {\n490\t\tif g.personProvider == nil {\n491\t\t\treturn nil\n492\t\t}\n493\t\n494\t\tpeopleHome := g.personProvider.GetPeopleHome()\n495\t\tif len(peopleHome) == 0 {\n496\t\t\treturn &Section{\n497\t\t\t\tType:     \"people\",\n498\t\t\t\tContent:  \"The house is currently empty.\",\n499\t\t\t\tPriority: 60,\n500\t\t\t}\n501\t\t}\n502\t\n503\t\tvar content string\n504\t\tif len(peopleHome) == 1 {\n505\t\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s is home.\", peopleHome[0])\n506\t\t} else {\n507\t\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s are home.\", strings.Join(peopleHome, \", \"))\n508\t\t}\n509\t\n510\t\t// Add information about who left when\n511\t\t// This would need event history, for now skip\n512\t\treturn &Section{\n513\t\t\tType:     \"people\",\n514\t\t\tContent:  content,\n515\t\t\tPriority: 60,\n516\t\t}\n517\t}\n518\t\n519\t// generateAnomalyBlock generates BLOCK 4 — Overnight anomalies.\n520\tfunc (g *Generator) generateAnomalyBlock(nightStart, nightEnd time.Time, person string) *Section {\n521\t\tquery := `SELECT type, zone, detail_json, timestamp_ms\n522\t\t           FROM events\n523\t\t           WHERE timestamp_ms >= ? AND timestamp_ms < ?\n524\t\t             AND type IN ('anomaly', 'unusual_activity')\n525\t\t             AND severity IN ('warning', 'alert')\n526\t\t           ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC`\n527\t\targs := []interface{}{nightStart.UnixMilli(), nightEnd.UnixMilli()}\n528\t\n529\t\tif person != \"\" {\n530\t\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n531\t\t\targs = append(args, person)\n532\t\t}\n533\t\tquery += ` LIMIT 3`\n534\t\n535\t\trows, err := g.db.Query(query, args...)\n536\t\tif err != nil {\n537\t\t\treturn nil\n538\t\t}\n539\t\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n540\t\n541\t\tvar anomalies []string\n542\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n543\t\t\tvar eventType, zone, detailJSON string\n544\t\t\tvar timestamp int64\n545\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&eventType, &zone, &detailJSON, &timestamp); err != nil {\n546\t\t\t\tcontinue\n547\t\t\t}\n548\t\n549\t\t\t// Parse anomaly score from detail_json\n550\t\t\tvar detail map[string]interface{}\n551\t\t\tvar score float64\n552\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(detailJSON), &detail); err == nil {\n553\t\t\t\tif s, ok := detail[\"score\"].(float64); ok {\n554\t\t\t\t\tscore = s\n555\t\t\t\t}\n556\t\t\t}\n557\t\n558\t\t\ttimeStr := time.Unix(0, timestamp*1e6).Format(\"3:04pm\")\n559\t\t\tvar anomaly strings.Builder\n560\t\t\tif zone != \"\" {\n561\t\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Motion in %s at %s\", zone, timeStr))\n562\t\t\t} else {\n563\t\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Unusual activity at %s\", timeStr))\n564\t\t\t}\n565\t\n566\t\t\tif score >= 0.85 {\n567\t\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(\". High-confidence.\")\n568\t\t\t} else if score < 0.7 {\n569\t\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(\". Likely environmental.\")\n570\t\t\t}\n571\t\n572\t\t\tanomalies = append(anomalies, anomaly.String())\n573\t\t}\n574\t\n575\t\tif len(anomalies) == 0 {\n576\t\t\treturn nil\n577\t\t}\n578\t\n579\t\tvar content string\n580\t\tif len(anomalies) == 1 {\n581\t\t\tcontent = \"Last night: \" + anomalies[0]\n582\t\t} else {\n583\t\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"Last night: %d unusual events. Most notable: \", len(anomalies)) + anomalies[0]\n584\t\t}\n585\t\n586\t\treturn &Section{\n587\t\t\tType:     \"anomaly\",\n588\t\t\tContent:  content,\n589\t\t\tPriority: 70,\n590\t\t}\n591\t}\n592\t\n593\t// generateHealthBlock generates BLOCK 5 — System health.\n594\tfunc (g *Generator) generateHealthBlock() *Section {\n595\t\tif g.healthProvider == nil {\n596\t\t\treturn nil\n597\t\t}\n598\t\n599\t\tquality := g.healthProvider.GetDetectionQuality()\n600\t\tonline, total := g.healthProvider.GetNodeCount()\n601\t\n602\t\t// Build content with node health details\n603\t\tvar contentParts []string\n604\t\n605\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d nodes healthy.\", online))\n606\t\n607\t\t// Check for offline nodes with duration\n608\t\tif g.nodeProvider != nil {\n609\t\t\tallMACs := g.nodeProvider.GetAllNodeMACs()\n610\t\t\tfor _, mac := range allMACs {\n611\t\t\t\t// Get offline duration from health provider\n612\t\t\t\tif g.healthProvider != nil {\n613\t\t\t\t\tduration := g.healthProvider.GetNodeOfflineDuration(mac)\n614\t\t\t\t\tif duration > 0 {\n615\t\t\t\t\t\tname := g.nodeProvider.GetNodeName(mac)\n616\t\t\t\t\t\tif name == \"\" {\n617\t\t\t\t\t\t\tname = mac\n618\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n619\t\n620\t\t\t\t\t\t// Format duration\n621\t\t\t\t\t\tdurationH := int(duration.Hours())\n622\t\t\t\t\t\tdurationM := int(duration.Minutes()) % 60\n623\t\t\t\t\t\tif durationH > 0 {\n624\t\t\t\t\t\t\tif durationM > 0 {\n625\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s has been offline for %dh %dm.\", name, durationH, durationM))\n626\t\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n627\t\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s has been offline for %dh.\", name, durationH))\n628\t\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n629\t\t\t\t\t\t} else if durationM > 0 {\n630\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s has been offline for %dmin.\", name, durationM))\n631\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n632\t\t\t\t\t}\n633\t\t\t\t}\n634\t\t\t}\n635\t\t}\n636\t\n637\t\t// Add detection quality if not excellent\n638\t\tif quality < 90 {\n639\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Detection quality: %.0f%%.\", quality))\n640\t\t}\n641\t\n642\t\t// Skip if everything is healthy\n643\t\tif len(contentParts) == 1 && online == total && quality >= 90 {\n644\t\t\treturn nil\n645\t\t}\n646\t\n647\t\tcontent := strings.Join(contentParts, \" \")\n648\t\n649\t\treturn &Section{\n650\t\t\tType:     SectionTypeSystemHealth,\n651\t\t\tContent:  content,\n652\t\t\tPriority: 30,\n653\t\t}\n654\t}\n655\t\n656\t// generatePredictionBlock generates BLOCK 6 — Prediction hint.\n657\tfunc (g *Generator) generatePredictionBlock(person string) *Section {\n658\t\tif g.predictionProvider == nil {\n659\t\t\treturn nil\n660\t\t}\n661\t\n662\t\t// Get prediction for next action (15 min horizon)\n663\t\tzone, probability, ok := g.predictionProvider.GetPrediction(person, 15)\n664\t\tif !ok || probability < 0.7 {\n665\t\t\treturn nil\n666\t\t}\n667\t\n668\t\t// Format day of week\n669\t\tnow := time.Now()\n670\t\tdayOfWeek := now.Weekday().String()\n671\t\n672\t\t// Find what action this prediction suggests\n673\t\tcontent := fmt.Sprintf(\"Today's forecast: Based on your %s pattern, you'll likely be in %s in 15 minutes (%.0f%% confidence).\",\n674\t\t\tdayOfWeek, zone, probability*100)\n675\t\n676\t\treturn &Section{\n677\t\t\tType:     \"prediction\",\n678\t\t\tContent:  content,\n679\t\t\tPriority: 40,\n680\t\t}\n681\t}\n682\t\n683\t// generateLearningBlock generates BLOCK 7 — Learning progress.\n684\tfunc (g *Generator) generateLearningBlock() *Section {\n685\t\tif g.healthProvider == nil {\n686\t\t\treturn nil\n687\t\t}\n688\t\n689\t\tdelta, feedbackCount := g.healthProvider.GetAccuracyDelta()\n690\t\tif feedbackCount == 0 {\n691\t\t\treturn nil\n692\t\t}\n693\t\n694\t\tvar content string\n695\t\tif delta > 0 {\n696\t\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"Accuracy improved %.0f%% this week thanks to your %d corrections.\",\n697\t\t\t\tdelta, feedbackCount)\n698\t\t} else {\n699\t\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"You provided %d corrections this week.\", feedbackCount)\n700\t\t}\n701\t\n702\t\treturn &Section{\n703\t\t\tType:     SectionTypeLearning,\n704\t\t\tContent:  content,\n705\t\t\tPriority: 20,\n706\t\t}\n707\t}\n708\t\n709\t// generateOvernightEventsBlock generates the overnight events section.\n710\t// Filters for FallDetected, AnomalyDetected, NodeDisconnected events during quiet hours.\n711\tfunc (g *Generator) generateOvernightEventsBlock(nightStart, nightEnd time.Time, person string) *Section {\n712\t\t// Calculate quiet hours period\n713\t\t// Use the passed time range directly (already calculated as 18:00 previous day to 06:00 current day)\n714\t\n715\t\tquery := `SELECT type, zone, person, detail_json, timestamp_ms, severity\n716\t\t           FROM events\n717\t\t           WHERE timestamp_ms >= ? AND timestamp_ms < ?\n718\t\t\t             AND type IN ('fall_alert', 'anomaly', 'node_disconnected')\n719\t\t\t             AND severity IN ('warning', 'alert', 'critical')\n720\t\t           ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC\n721\t\t           LIMIT 6`\n722\t\n723\t\targs := []interface{}{nightStart.UnixMilli(), nightEnd.UnixMilli()}\n724\t\n725\t\tif person != \"\" {\n726\t\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n727\t\t\targs = append(args, person)\n728\t\t}\n729\t\n730\t\trows, err := g.db.Query(query, args...)\n731\t\tif err != nil {\n732\t\t\treturn nil\n733\t\t}\n734\t\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n735\t\n736\t\tvar events []struct {\n737\t\t\tType       string\n738\t\t\tZone       string\n739\t\t\tPerson     string\n740\t\t\tDetailJSON string\n741\t\t\tTimestamp  int64\n742\t\t\tSeverity   string\n743\t\t\tAcked      bool\n744\t\t}\n745\t\n746\t\tfor rows.Next() {\n747\t\t\tvar e struct {\n748\t\t\t\tType       string\n749\t\t\t\tZone       string\n750\t\t\t\tPerson     string\n751\t\t\t\tDetailJSON string\n752\t\t\t\tTimestamp  int64\n753\t\t\t\tSeverity   string\n754\t\t\t\tAcked      bool\n755\t\t\t}\n756\t\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&e.Type, &e.Zone, &e.Person, &e.DetailJSON, &e.Timestamp, &e.Severity); err != nil {\n757\t\t\t\tcontinue\n758\t\t\t}\n759\t\n760\t\t\t// Check if acknowledged from detail_json\n761\t\t\tvar detail map[string]interface{}\n762\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(e.DetailJSON), &detail); err == nil {\n763\t\t\t\tif acked, ok := detail[\"acknowledged\"].(bool); ok {\n764\t\t\t\t\te.Acked = acked\n765\t\t\t\t}\n766\t\t\t}\n767\t\n768\t\t\tevents = append(events, e)\n769\t\t}\n770\t\n771\t\tif len(events) == 0 {\n772\t\t\treturn &Section{\n773\t\t\t\tType:     SectionTypeOvernightEvents,\n774\t\t\t\tContent:  \"No incidents overnight.\",\n775\t\t\t\tPriority: 40,\n776\t\t\t}\n777\t\t}\n778\t\n779\t\tvar contentParts []string\n780\t\tfor i, e := range events {\n781\t\t\tvar eventStr strings.Builder\n782\t\t\ttimeStr := time.Unix(0, e.Timestamp*1e6).Format(\"3:04pm\")\n783\t\n784\t\t\tswitch e.Type {\n785\t\t\tcase \"fall_alert\":\n786\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Possible fall detected at %s\", timeStr))\n787\t\t\t\tif e.Person != \"\" {\n788\t\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" for %s\", e.Person))\n789\t\t\t\t}\n790\t\t\t\tif e.Zone != \"\" {\n791\t\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" in %s\", e.Zone))\n792\t\t\t\t}\n793\t\t\t\tif e.Acked {\n794\t\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(\" (acknowledged)\")\n795\t\t\t\t}\n796\t\n797\t\t\tcase \"anomaly\":\n798\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Anomaly detected at %s\", timeStr))\n799\t\t\t\tif e.Zone != \"\" {\n800\t\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" in %s\", e.Zone))\n801\t\t\t\t}\n802\t\t\t\tif e.Acked {\n803\t\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(\" (acknowledged)\")\n804\t\t\t\t}\n805\t\n806\t\t\tcase \"node_disconnected\":\n807\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s went offline at %s\", e.Zone, timeStr))\n808\t\t\t\t// Try to get reconnection time\n809\t\t\t\tvar reconnectTime sql.NullInt64\n810\t\t\t\treconnectQuery := `SELECT timestamp_ms FROM events\n811\t\t\t\t                   WHERE type = 'node_connected' AND zone = ?\n812\t\t\t\t                   AND timestamp_ms > ? ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC LIMIT 1`\n813\t\t\t\terr := g.db.QueryRow(reconnectQuery, e.Zone, e.Timestamp).Scan(&reconnectTime)\n814\t\t\t\tif err == nil && reconnectTime.Valid {\n815\t\t\t\t\treconnectStr := time.Unix(0, reconnectTime.Int64*1e6).Format(\"3:04pm\")\n816\t\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" and reconnected at %s\", reconnectStr))\n817\t\t\t\t}\n818\t\t\t}\n819\t\n820\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, eventStr.String())\n821\t\n822\t\t\t// Limit to 5 events\n823\t\t\tif i >= 4 && len(events) > 5 {\n824\t\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"...and %d more events.\", len(events)-5))\n825\t\t\t\tbreak\n826\t\t\t}\n827\t\t}\n828\t\n829\t\tcontent := strings.Join(contentParts, \". \")\n830\t\tif len(contentParts) > 1 {\n831\t\t\tcontent += \".\"\n832\t\t}\n833\t\n834\t\treturn &Section{\n835\t\t\tType:     SectionTypeOvernightEvents,\n836\t\t\tContent:  content,\n837\t\t\tPriority: 75,\n838\t\t}\n839\t}\n840\t\n841\t// generateWeatherBlock generates the optional weather section.\n842\tfunc (g *Generator) generateWeatherBlock() *Section {\n843\t\tif g.weatherAPIURL == \"\" {\n844\t\t\treturn nil\n845\t\t}\n846\t\n847\t\t// Fetch weather from wttr.in\n848\t\t// Format: GET https://wttr.in/{location}?format=%t+%C\n849\t\tclient := &http.Client{Timeout: 10 * time.Second}\n850\t\tresp, err := client.Get(g.weatherAPIURL)\n851\t\tif err != nil {\n852\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to fetch weather: %v\", err)\n853\t\t\treturn nil\n854\t\t}\n855\t\tdefer resp.Body.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n856\t\n857\t\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {\n858\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Weather API returned status %d\", resp.StatusCode)\n859\t\t\treturn nil\n860\t\t}\n861\t\n862\t\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n863\t\tif err != nil {\n864\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to read weather response: %v\", err)\n865\t\t\treturn nil\n866\t\t}\n867\t\n868\t\tweather := strings.TrimSpace(string(body))\n869\t\tif weather == \"\" || weather == \"Unknown\" {\n870\t\t\treturn nil\n871\t\t}\n872\t\n873\t\treturn &Section{\n874\t\t\tType:     SectionTypeWeather,\n875\t\t\tContent:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Outside: %s\", weather),\n876\t\t\tPriority: 15,\n877\t\t}\n878\t}\n879\t\n880\t// getAverageSleepDuration calculates average sleep duration over the past 7 days.\n881\tfunc (g *Generator) getAverageSleepDuration(person string) int {\n882\t\tquery := `SELECT AVG(duration_min) FROM sleep_records\n883\t\t           WHERE date >= date('now', '-7 days')`\n884\t\targs := []interface{}{}\n885\t\tif person != \"\" {\n886\t\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n887\t\t\targs = append(args, person)\n888\t\t}\n889\t\n890\t\tvar avg sql.NullFloat64\n891\t\terr := g.db.QueryRow(query, args...).Scan(&avg)\n892\t\tif err != nil || !avg.Valid {\n893\t\t\treturn 0\n894\t\t}\n895\t\treturn int(avg.Float64)\n896\t}\n897\t\n898\t// Save persists a briefing to the briefings table.\n899\tfunc (g *Generator) Save(b *Briefing) error {\n900\t\t// Check which columns exist in the briefings table\n901\t\tvar personColExists, sectionsJSONColExists bool\n902\t\n903\t\t// Check for person column\n904\t\terr := g.db.QueryRow(`\n905\t\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM pragma_table_info('briefings') WHERE name = 'person'\n906\t\t`).Scan(&personColExists)\n907\t\tif err != nil {\n908\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check person column: %w\", err)\n909\t\t}\n910\t\n911\t\t// Check for sections_json column\n912\t\terr = g.db.QueryRow(`\n913\t\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM pragma_table_info('briefings') WHERE name = 'sections_json'\n914\t\t`).Scan(&sectionsJSONColExists)\n915\t\tif err != nil {\n916\t\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check sections_json column: %w\", err)\n917\t\t}\n918\t\n919\t\t// Build query dynamically {\n\tg.nodeProvider = n\n}\n\n// DailyBriefing is the primary struct for a morning briefing.\n// Alias for Briefing with additional delivery tracking fields.\ntype DailyBriefing = Briefing\n\n// Briefing struct {\n\tID           string            `json:\"id\"` // UUID\n\tDate         string            `json:\"date\"`\n\tPerson       string            `json:\"person,omitempty\"`\n\tContent      string            `json:\"content\"`\n\tGeneratedAt  int64             `json:\"generated_at\"`\n\tSections     []Section         `json:\"sections,omitempty\"`\n\tDelivered    bool `json:\"metadata,omitempty\"` // Additional metadata\n}\n\n// Section represents a single section of the briefing.\ntype Section struct {\n\tType     BriefingSectionType `json:\"type\"`\n\tContent  string              `json:\"content\"`\n\tPriority int                 `json:\"priority\"`           // Higher = shown first\n\tSeverity string              `json:\"severity,omitempty\"` // For alerts: \"info\", \"warning\", \"error\"\n}\n\n// Generate creates a morning briefing for the given date and person.\n// If person is empty, generates a household-wide briefing.\nfunc (g *Generator) Generate(date string, person string) (*Briefing, error) {\n\tvar sections []Section\n\n\t// Parse date for calculations\n\tdateTime, err := time.Parse(\"2006-01-02\", date)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"parse date: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Calculate time range for \"last night\" (previous day 18:00 to current day 06:00)\n\t// This covers the overnight period including early morning hours\n\tnightStart := time.Date(dateTime.Year(), dateTime.Month(), dateTime.Day()-1, 18, 0, 0, 0, time.Local)\n\tnightEnd := time.Date(dateTime.Year(), dateTime.Month(), dateTime.Day(), 6, 0, 0, 0, time.Local)\n\n\t// BLOCK 1 — Critical alerts (fall, security)\n\tif alertSection := g.generateAlertBlock(nightStart, nightEnd, person); alertSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *alertSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// BLOCK 2 — Sleep summary\n\tif sleepSection := g.generateSleepBlock(date, person); sleepSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *sleepSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// BLOCK 3 — Who is home (current state)\n\tif peopleSection := g.generatePeopleBlock(person); peopleSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *peopleSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// BLOCK 4 — Overnight events (replaces anomaly block with more detailed filtering)\n\tif overnightSection := g.generateOvernightEventsBlock(nightStart, nightEnd, person); overnightSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *overnightSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// BLOCK 5 — System health\n\tif healthSection := g.generateHealthBlock(); healthSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *healthSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// BLOCK 6 — Weather (optional)\n\tif weatherSection := g.generateWeatherBlock(); weatherSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *weatherSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// BLOCK 7 — Prediction hint\n\tif predictionSection := g.generatePredictionBlock(person); predictionSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *predictionSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// BLOCK 8 — Learning progress\n\tif learningSection := g.generateLearningBlock(); learningSection != nil {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, *learningSection)\n\t}\n\n\t// Degenerate case\n\tif len(sections) == 0 {\n\t\tsections = append(sections, Section{\n\t\t\tType:     \"info\",\n\t\t\tContent:  \"All quiet last night. All systems healthy.\",\n\t\t\tPriority: 0,\n\t\t})\n\t}\n\n\t// Sort by priority descending\n\tfor i := 0; i < len(sections)-1; i++ {\n\t\tfor j := i + 1; j < len(sections); j++ {\n\t\t\tif sections[j].Priority > sections[i].Priority {\n\t\t\t\tsections[i], sections[j] = sections[j], sections[i]\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Build content from prioritized sections\n\tcontentParts := make([]string, 0, len(sections))\n\tfor _, s := range sections {\n\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, s.Content)\n\t}\n\tcontent := strings.Join(contentParts, \"\\n\\n\")\n\n\treturn &Briefing{\n\t\tID:           uuid.New().String(),\n\t\tDate:         date,\n\t\tPerson:       person,\n\t\tContent:      content,\n\t\tGeneratedAt:  time.Now().UnixMilli(),\n\t\tSections:     sections,\n\t\tDelivered:    false,\n\t\tAcknowledged: false,\n\t}, nil\n}\n\n// generateAlertBlock generates BLOCK 1 — Critical alerts.\nfunc (g *Generator) generateAlertBlock(nightStart, nightEnd time.Time, person string) *Section {\n\tquery := `SELECT type, zone, person, detail_json, severity\n\t           FROM events\n\t           WHERE timestamp_ms >= ? AND timestamp_ms < ?\n\t             AND type IN ('fall_alert', 'security_alert')\n\t             AND severity IN ('alert', 'critical')`\n\targs := []interface{}{nightStart.UnixMilli(), nightEnd.UnixMilli()}\n\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t}\n\tquery += ` ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC LIMIT 5`\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Alert query: nightStart=%s (%d), nightEnd=%s (%d), person=%s\",\n\t\tnightStart, nightStart.UnixMilli(), nightEnd, nightEnd.UnixMilli(), person)\n\n\trows, err := g.db.Query(query, args...)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Alert query error: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\n\tvar alerts []string\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar eventType, zone, personName, detailJSON, severity string\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&eventType, &zone, &personName, &detailJSON, &severity); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Scan error: %v\", err)\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar alert strings.Builder\n\t\tswitch eventType {\n\t\tcase \"fall_alert\":\n\t\t\talert.WriteString(\"⚠ Fall detected\")\n\t\t\tif personName != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\talert.WriteString(\": \")\n\t\t\t\talert.WriteString(personName)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif zone != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\talert.WriteString(\" in \")\n\t\t\t\talert.WriteString(zone)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\tcase \"security_alert\":\n\t\t\talert.WriteString(\"⚠ Security alert\")\n\t\t\tif zone != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\talert.WriteString(\": Motion in \")\n\t\t\t\talert.WriteString(zone)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t\talerts = append(alerts, alert.String())\n\t}\n\n\tif len(alerts) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tcontent := \"⚠ \" + strings.Join(alerts, \"; \")\n\tif len(alerts) > 1 {\n\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"⚠ %d critical events overnight. \", len(alerts)) + strings.Join(alerts, \"; \")\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     \"alert\",\n\t\tContent:  content,\n\t\tPriority: 100,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generateSleepBlock generates BLOCK 2 — Sleep summary.\nfunc (g *Generator) generateSleepBlock(date, person string) *Section {\n\tquery := `SELECT duration_min, onset_latency_min, restlessness,\n\t                 breathing_rate_avg, breathing_regularity, breathing_anomaly,\n\t                 breathing_samples_json, person\n\t           FROM sleep_records WHERE date = ?`\n\targs := []interface{}{date}\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := g.db.Query(query, args...)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\n\tvar sleepRecords []struct {\n\t\tDuration      sql.NullInt32\n\t\tOnsetLatency  sql.NullFloat64\n\t\tRestlessness  sql.NullFloat64\n\t\tBreathAvg     sql.NullFloat64\n\t\tBreathReg     sql.NullFloat64\n\t\tBreathAnomaly sql.NullBool\n\t\tBreathSamples sql.NullString\n\t\tPerson        sql.NullString\n\t}\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar r struct {\n\t\t\tDuration      sql.NullInt32\n\t\t\tOnsetLatency  sql.NullFloat64\n\t\t\tRestlessness  sql.NullFloat64\n\t\t\tBreathAvg     sql.NullFloat64\n\t\t\tBreathReg     sql.NullFloat64\n\t\t\tBreathAnomaly sql.NullBool\n\t\t\tBreathSamples sql.NullString\n\t\t\tPerson        sql.NullString\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&r.Duration, &r.OnsetLatency, &r.Restlessness,\n\t\t\t&r.BreathAvg, &r.BreathReg, &r.BreathAnomaly, &r.BreathSamples, &r.Person); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\t\tsleepRecords = append(sleepRecords, r)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(sleepRecords) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// For multi-person, aggregate or pick the primary record\n\t// For now, use the first record\n\tr := sleepRecords[0]\n\n\tvar parts []string\n\tpersonName := \"You\"\n\tif r.Person.Valid && r.Person.String != \"\" {\n\t\tpersonName = r.Person.String\n\t}\n\n\t// Duration and deviation from average\n\tif r.Duration.Valid && r.Duration.Int32 > 0 {\n\t\th := r.Duration.Int32 / 60\n\t\tm := r.Duration.Int32 % 60\n\t\tif m > 0 {\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s slept %dh %dm\", personName, h, m))\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"%s slept %dh\", personName, h))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Compare with average (get from recent records)\n\t\tavgDuration := g.getAverageSleepDuration(r.Person.String)\n\t\tif avgDuration > 0 {\n\t\t\tdelta := int(r.Duration.Int32) - avgDuration\n\t\t\tif math.Abs(float64(delta)) >= 10 {\n\t\t\t\tif delta > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tparts[len(parts)-1] += fmt.Sprintf(\" — %d minutes more than your average\", delta)\n\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\tparts[len(parts)-1] += fmt.Sprintf(\" — %d minutes less than your average\", -delta)\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t} else {\n\t\tparts = append(parts, personName+\" slept\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Restlessness\n\tif r.Restlessness.Valid {\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase r.Restlessness.Float64 < 1:\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Restlessness: Low.\")\n\t\tcase r.Restlessness.Float64 < 3:\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Restlessness: Moderate.\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Restlessness: High.\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Breathing regularity\n\tif r.BreathReg.Valid {\n\t\tcv := r.BreathReg.Float64\n\t\tswitch {\n\t\tcase cv < 0.10:\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Breathing: Regular.\")\n\t\tcase cv > 0.25:\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Breathing: Irregular.\")\n\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\tparts = append(parts, \"Breathing: Normal.\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Breathing anomaly\n\tif r.BreathAnomaly.Valid && r.BreathAnomaly.Bool {\n\t\tif r.BreathSamples.Valid {\n\t\t\tvar info map[string]interface{}\n\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(r.BreathSamples.String), &info); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tavg, _ := info[\"avg\"].(float64)\n\t\t\t\tpersonal, _ := info[\"personal_avg\"].(float64)\n\t\t\t\tif personal > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Breathing rate elevated (%.0f bpm vs. %.0f bpm average).\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\tavg, personal))\n\t\t\t\t} else if avg > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tparts = append(parts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Breathing rate elevated (%.0f bpm).\", avg))\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(parts) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     \"sleep\",\n\t\tContent:  strings.Join(parts, \" \"),\n\t\tPriority: 80,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generatePeopleBlock generates BLOCK 3 — Who is home.\nfunc (g *Generator) generatePeopleBlock(person string) *Section {\n\tif g.personProvider == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tpeopleHome := g.personProvider.GetPeopleHome()\n\tif len(peopleHome) == 0 {\n\t\treturn &Section{\n\t\t\tType:     \"people\",\n\t\t\tContent:  \"The house is currently empty.\",\n\t\t\tPriority: 60,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar content string\n\tif len(peopleHome) == 1 {\n\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s is home.\", peopleHome[0])\n\t} else {\n\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s are home.\", strings.Join(peopleHome, \", \"))\n\t}\n\n\t// Add information about who left when\n\t// This would need event history, for now skip\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     \"people\",\n\t\tContent:  content,\n\t\tPriority: 60,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generateAnomalyBlock generates BLOCK 4 — Overnight anomalies.\nfunc (g *Generator) generateAnomalyBlock(nightStart, nightEnd time.Time, person string) *Section {\n\tquery := `SELECT type, zone, detail_json, timestamp_ms\n\t           FROM events\n\t           WHERE timestamp_ms >= ? AND timestamp_ms < ?\n\t             AND type IN ('anomaly', 'unusual_activity')\n\t             AND severity IN ('warning', 'alert')\n\t           ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC`\n\targs := []interface{}{nightStart.UnixMilli(), nightEnd.UnixMilli()}\n\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t}\n\tquery += ` LIMIT 3`\n\n\trows, err := g.db.Query(query, args...)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\n\tvar anomalies []string\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar eventType, zone, detailJSON string\n\t\tvar timestamp int64\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&eventType, &zone, &detailJSON, &timestamp); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Parse anomaly score from detail_json\n\t\tvar detail map[string]interface{}\n\t\tvar score float64\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(detailJSON), &detail); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif s, ok := detail[\"score\"].(float64); ok {\n\t\t\t\tscore = s\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\ttimeStr := time.Unix(0, timestamp*1e6).Format(\"3:04pm\")\n\t\tvar anomaly strings.Builder\n\t\tif zone != \"\" {\n\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Motion in %s at %s\", zone, timeStr))\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Unusual activity at %s\", timeStr))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif score >= 0.85 {\n\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(\". High-confidence.\")\n\t\t} else if score < 0.7 {\n\t\t\tanomaly.WriteString(\". Likely environmental.\")\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tanomalies = append(anomalies, anomaly.String())\n\t}\n\n\tif len(anomalies) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar content string\n\tif len(anomalies) == 1 {\n\t\tcontent = \"Last night: \" + anomalies[0]\n\t} else {\n\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"Last night: %d unusual events. Most notable: \", len(anomalies)) + anomalies[0]\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     \"anomaly\",\n\t\tContent:  content,\n\t\tPriority: 70,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generateHealthBlock generates BLOCK 5 — System health.\nfunc (g *Generator) generateHealthBlock() *Section {\n\tif g.healthProvider == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tquality := g.healthProvider.GetDetectionQuality()\n\tonline, total := g.healthProvider.GetNodeCount()\n\n\t// Build content with node health details\n\tvar contentParts []string\n\n\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d nodes healthy.\", online))\n\n\t// Check for offline nodes with duration\n\tif g.nodeProvider != nil {\n\t\tallMACs := g.nodeProvider.GetAllNodeMACs()\n\t\tfor _, mac := range allMACs {\n\t\t\t// Get offline duration from health provider\n\t\t\tif g.healthProvider != nil {\n\t\t\t\tduration := g.healthProvider.GetNodeOfflineDuration(mac)\n\t\t\t\tif duration > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\tname := g.nodeProvider.GetNodeName(mac)\n\t\t\t\t\tif name == \"\" {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tname = mac\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\t\t\t// Format duration\n\t\t\t\t\tdurationH := int(duration.Hours())\n\t\t\t\t\tdurationM := int(duration.Minutes()) % 60\n\t\t\t\t\tif durationH > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tif durationM > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s has been offline for %dh %dm.\", name, durationH, durationM))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s has been offline for %dh.\", name, durationH))\n\t\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\t} else if durationM > 0 {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s has been offline for %dmin.\", name, durationM))\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Add detection quality if not excellent\n\tif quality < 90 {\n\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"Detection quality: %.0f%%.\", quality))\n\t}\n\n\t// Skip if everything is healthy\n\tif len(contentParts) == 1 && online == total && quality >= 90 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tcontent := strings.Join(contentParts, \" \")\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     SectionTypeSystemHealth,\n\t\tContent:  content,\n\t\tPriority: 30,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generatePredictionBlock generates BLOCK 6 — Prediction hint.\nfunc (g *Generator) generatePredictionBlock(person string) *Section {\n\tif g.predictionProvider == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Get prediction for next action (15 min horizon)\n\tzone, probability, ok := g.predictionProvider.GetPrediction(person, 15)\n\tif !ok || probability < 0.7 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Format day of week\n\tnow := time.Now()\n\tdayOfWeek := now.Weekday().String()\n\n\t// Find what action this prediction suggests\n\tcontent := fmt.Sprintf(\"Today's forecast: Based on your %s pattern, you'll likely be in %s in 15 minutes (%.0f%% confidence).\",\n\t\tdayOfWeek, zone, probability*100)\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     \"prediction\",\n\t\tContent:  content,\n\t\tPriority: 40,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generateLearningBlock generates BLOCK 7 — Learning progress.\nfunc (g *Generator) generateLearningBlock() *Section {\n\tif g.healthProvider == nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tdelta, feedbackCount := g.healthProvider.GetAccuracyDelta()\n\tif feedbackCount == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tvar content string\n\tif delta > 0 {\n\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"Accuracy improved %.0f%% this week thanks to your %d corrections.\",\n\t\t\tdelta, feedbackCount)\n\t} else {\n\t\tcontent = fmt.Sprintf(\"You provided %d corrections this week.\", feedbackCount)\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     SectionTypeLearning,\n\t\tContent:  content,\n\t\tPriority: 20,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generateOvernightEventsBlock generates the overnight events section.\n// Filters for FallDetected, AnomalyDetected, NodeDisconnected events during quiet hours.\nfunc (g *Generator) generateOvernightEventsBlock(nightStart, nightEnd time.Time, person string) *Section {\n\t// Calculate quiet hours period\n\t// Use the passed time range directly (already calculated as 18:00 previous day to 06:00 current day)\n\n\tquery := `SELECT type, zone, person, detail_json, timestamp_ms, severity\n\t           FROM events\n\t           WHERE timestamp_ms >= ? AND timestamp_ms < ?\n\t\t             AND type IN ('fall_alert', 'anomaly', 'node_disconnected')\n\t\t             AND severity IN ('warning', 'alert', 'critical')\n\t           ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC\n\t           LIMIT 6`\n\n\targs := []interface{}{nightStart.UnixMilli(), nightEnd.UnixMilli()}\n\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t}\n\n\trows, err := g.db.Query(query, args...)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tdefer rows.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\n\tvar events []struct {\n\t\tType       string\n\t\tZone       string\n\t\tPerson     string\n\t\tDetailJSON string\n\t\tTimestamp  int64\n\t\tSeverity   string\n\t\tAcked      bool\n\t}\n\n\tfor rows.Next() {\n\t\tvar e struct {\n\t\t\tType       string\n\t\t\tZone       string\n\t\t\tPerson     string\n\t\t\tDetailJSON string\n\t\t\tTimestamp  int64\n\t\t\tSeverity   string\n\t\t\tAcked      bool\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := rows.Scan(&e.Type, &e.Zone, &e.Person, &e.DetailJSON, &e.Timestamp, &e.Severity); err != nil {\n\t\t\tcontinue\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Check if acknowledged from detail_json\n\t\tvar detail map[string]interface{}\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(e.DetailJSON), &detail); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif acked, ok := detail[\"acknowledged\"].(bool); ok {\n\t\t\t\te.Acked = acked\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tevents = append(events, e)\n\t}\n\n\tif len(events) == 0 {\n\t\treturn &Section{\n\t\t\tType:     SectionTypeOvernightEvents,\n\t\t\tContent:  \"No incidents overnight.\",\n\t\t\tPriority: 40,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tvar contentParts []string\n\tfor i, e := range events {\n\t\tvar eventStr strings.Builder\n\t\ttimeStr := time.Unix(0, e.Timestamp*1e6).Format(\"3:04pm\")\n\n\t\tswitch e.Type {\n\t\tcase \"fall_alert\":\n\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Possible fall detected at %s\", timeStr))\n\t\t\tif e.Person != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" for %s\", e.Person))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif e.Zone != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" in %s\", e.Zone))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif e.Acked {\n\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(\" (acknowledged)\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\tcase \"anomaly\":\n\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Anomaly detected at %s\", timeStr))\n\t\t\tif e.Zone != \"\" {\n\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" in %s\", e.Zone))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tif e.Acked {\n\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(\" (acknowledged)\")\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\tcase \"node_disconnected\":\n\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\"Node %s went offline at %s\", e.Zone, timeStr))\n\t\t\t// Try to get reconnection time\n\t\t\tvar reconnectTime sql.NullInt64\n\t\t\treconnectQuery := `SELECT timestamp_ms FROM events\n\t\t\t                   WHERE type = 'node_connected' AND zone = ?\n\t\t\t                   AND timestamp_ms > ? ORDER BY timestamp_ms ASC LIMIT 1`\n\t\t\terr := g.db.QueryRow(reconnectQuery, e.Zone, e.Timestamp).Scan(&reconnectTime)\n\t\t\tif err == nil && reconnectTime.Valid {\n\t\t\t\treconnectStr := time.Unix(0, reconnectTime.Int64*1e6).Format(\"3:04pm\")\n\t\t\t\teventStr.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf(\" and reconnected at %s\", reconnectStr))\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, eventStr.String())\n\n\t\t// Limit to 5 events\n\t\tif i >= 4 && len(events) > 5 {\n\t\t\tcontentParts = append(contentParts, fmt.Sprintf(\"...and %d more events.\", len(events)-5))\n\t\t\tbreak\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tcontent := strings.Join(contentParts, \". \")\n\tif len(contentParts) > 1 {\n\t\tcontent += \".\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     SectionTypeOvernightEvents,\n\t\tContent:  content,\n\t\tPriority: 75,\n\t}\n}\n\n// generateWeatherBlock generates the optional weather section.\nfunc (g *Generator) generateWeatherBlock() *Section {\n\tif g.weatherAPIURL == \"\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t// Fetch weather from wttr.in\n\t// Format: GET https://wttr.in/{location}?format=%t+%C\n\tclient := &http.Client{Timeout: 10 * time.Second}\n\tresp, err := client.Get(g.weatherAPIURL)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to fetch weather: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tdefer resp.Body.Close() //nolint:errcheck\n\n\tif resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Weather API returned status %d\", resp.StatusCode)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tbody, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to read weather response: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\tweather := strings.TrimSpace(string(body))\n\tif weather == \"\" || weather == \"Unknown\" {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Section{\n\t\tType:     SectionTypeWeather,\n\t\tContent:  fmt.Sprintf(\"Outside: %s\", weather),\n\t\tPriority: 15,\n\t}\n}\n\n// getAverageSleepDuration calculates average sleep duration over the past 7 days.\nfunc (g *Generator) getAverageSleepDuration(person string) int {\n\tquery := `SELECT AVG(duration_min) FROM sleep_records\n\t           WHERE date >= date('now', '-7 days')`\n\targs := []interface{}{}\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t}\n\n\tvar avg sql.NullFloat64\n\terr := g.db.QueryRow(query, args...).Scan(&avg)\n\tif err != nil || !avg.Valid {\n\t\treturn 0\n\t}\n\treturn int(avg.Float64)\n}\n\n// Save persists a briefing to the briefings table.\nfunc (g *Generator) Save(b *Briefing) error {\n\t// Check which columns exist in the briefings table\n\tvar personColExists, sectionsJSONColExists bool\n\n\t// Check for person column\n\terr := g.db.QueryRow(`\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM pragma_table_info('briefings') WHERE name = 'person'\n\t`).Scan(&personColExists)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check person column: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Check for sections_json column\n\terr = g.db.QueryRow(`\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM pragma_table_info('briefings') WHERE name = 'sections_json'\n\t`).Scan(&sectionsJSONColExists)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check sections_json column: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\t// Build query dynamically based on available columns\n\tif personColExists && sectionsJSONColExists {\n\t\t// Marshal sections to JSON if present\n\t\tvar sectionsJSON sql.NullString\n\t\tif len(b.Sections) > 0 {\n\t\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(b.Sections)\n\t\t\tif err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tsectionsJSON = sql.NullString{String: string(data), Valid: true}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t_, err = g.db.Exec(`\n\t\t\tINSERT OR REPLACE INTO briefings (date, person, content, generated_at, sections_json)\n\t\t\tVALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n\t\t`, b.Date, b.Person, b.Content, b.GeneratedAt, sectionsJSON)\n\t\treturn err\n\t}\n\n\t// Fallback for old schema without person and sections_json\n\t_, err = g.db.Exec(`\n\t\tINSERT OR REPLACE INTO briefings (date, content, generated_at)\n\t\tVALUES (?, ?, ?)\n\t`, b.Date, b.Content, b.GeneratedAt)\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// Get retrieves a previously generated briefing by date and optional person.\nfunc (g *Generator) Get(date string, person string) (*Briefing, error) {\n\t// First, try to query with sections_json (new schema)\n\tvar content string\n\tvar generatedAt int64\n\tvar personVal sql.NullString\n\tvar sectionsJSON sql.NullString\n\n\tquery := `SELECT content, generated_at, person, sections_json FROM briefings WHERE date = ?`\n\targs := []interface{}{date}\n\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t} else {\n\t\tquery += ` AND (person IS NULL OR person = '')`\n\t}\n\n\terr := g.db.QueryRow(query, args...).Scan(&content, &generatedAt, &personVal, &sectionsJSON)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t// If the query fails, it might be because sections_json column doesn't exist\n\t\t// Try fallback query without sections_json\n\t\tquery = `SELECT content, generated_at FROM briefings WHERE date = ?`\n\t\targs = []interface{}{date}\n\n\t\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\t\tquery += ` AND person = ?`\n\t\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tquery += ` AND (person IS NULL OR person = '')`\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tvar content2 string\n\t\tvar generatedAt2 int64\n\t\terr2 := g.db.QueryRow(query, args...).Scan(&content2, &generatedAt2)\n\t\tif err2 != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err2\n\t\t}\n\t\tcontent = content2\n\t\tgeneratedAt = generatedAt2\n\t\t// personVal and sectionsJSON remain NULL/invalid\n\t}\n\n\tb := &Briefing{\n\t\tDate:        date,\n\t\tPerson:      personVal.String,\n\t\tContent:     content,\n\t\tGeneratedAt: generatedAt,\n\t}\n\n\t// Unmarshal sections if present\n\tif sectionsJSON.Valid {\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(sectionsJSON.String), &b.Sections); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to unmarshal sections for %s: %v\", date, err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn b, nil\n}\n\n// GetLatest retrieves the most recent briefing (for any person).\nfunc (g *Generator) GetLatest() (*Briefing, error) {\n\tvar date, person, content string\n\tvar generatedAt int64\n\tvar sectionsJSON sql.NullString\n\n\t// Try new schema first\n\terr := g.db.QueryRow(`\n\t\tSELECT date, person, content, generated_at, sections_json\n\t\tFROM briefings\n\t\tORDER BY generated_at DESC\n\t\tLIMIT 1\n\t`).Scan(&date, &person, &content, &generatedAt, &sectionsJSON)\n\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t// Fallback to old schema without sections_json\n\t\terr = g.db.QueryRow(`\n\t\t\tSELECT date, content, generated_at\n\t\t\tFROM briefings\n\t\t\tORDER BY generated_at DESC\n\t\t\tLIMIT 1\n\t\t`).Scan(&date, &content, &generatedAt)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\t// person and sectionsJSON remain empty/invalid\n\t}\n\n\tb := &Briefing{\n\t\tDate:        date,\n\t\tPerson:      person,\n\t\tContent:     content,\n\t\tGeneratedAt: generatedAt,\n\t}\n\n\t// Unmarshal sections if present\n\tif sectionsJSON.Valid {\n\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(sectionsJSON.String), &b.Sections); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to unmarshal sections for latest briefing: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\treturn b, nil\n}\n\n// ShouldGenerate checks if a briefing should be generated for the given date.\n// Returns true if no briefing exists for this date yet.\nfunc (g *Generator) ShouldGenerate(date string, person string) bool {\n\tvar count int\n\tquery := `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM briefings WHERE date = ?`\n\targs := []interface{}{date}\n\n\tif person != \"\" {\n\t\tquery += ` AND (person = ? OR person IS NULL OR person = '')`\n\t\targs = append(args, person)\n\t}\n\n\terr := g.db.QueryRow(query, args...).Scan(&count)\n\treturn err == nil && count == 0\n}\n\n// MarkDelivered marks a briefing as delivered.\nfunc (g *Generator) MarkDelivered(id string) error {\n\t// Check if delivered column exists\n\tvar deliveredColExists bool\n\terr := g.db.QueryRow(`\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM pragma_table_info('briefings') WHERE name = 'delivered'\n\t`).Scan(&deliveredColExists)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check delivered column: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tif !deliveredColExists {\n\t\t// Column doesn't exist yet, skip\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, err = g.db.Exec(`UPDATE briefings SET delivered = 1 WHERE id = ?`, id)\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// MarkAcknowledged marks a briefing as acknowledged by the user.\nfunc (g *Generator) MarkAcknowledged(id string) error {\n\t// Check if acknowledged column exists\n\tvar acknowledgedColExists bool\n\terr := g.db.QueryRow(`\n\t\tSELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM pragma_table_info('briefings') WHERE name = 'acknowledged'\n\t`).Scan(&acknowledgedColExists)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn fmt.Errorf(\"check acknowledged column: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\n\tif !acknowledgedColExists {\n\t\t// Column doesn't exist yet, skip\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\n\t_, err = g.db.Exec(`UPDATE briefings SET acknowledged = 1 WHERE id = ?`, id)\n\treturn err\n}\n\n// GetTodayBriefing returns today's briefing as a map for the dashboard.\nfunc (g *Generator) GetTodayBriefing() (map[string]interface{}, error) {\n\ttoday := time.Now().Format(\"2006-01-02\")\n\n\tb, err := g.Get(today, \"\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t// No briefing exists, try generating one\n\t\tb, err = g.Generate(today, \"\")\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\treturn nil, err\n\t\t}\n\t\t// Save the new briefing\n\t\tif err := g.Save(b); automatic briefing generation and push notifications.\ntype Scheduler struct {\n\tgenerator     *Generator\n\tnotifyService NotifyService\n\tmu            sync.RWMutex\n\tconfig        SchedulerConfig\n\tticker        *time.Ticker\n\tstopChan      chan struct{}\n\trunning       bool\n}\n\n// SchedulerConfig holds scheduling configuration.\ntype SchedulerConfig struct {\n\tEnabled          bool\n\tTime             string // HH:MM format, e.g., \"07:00\"\n\tPushNotification bool\n\tAutoGenerate     bool\n\tTimezone         string // IANA timezone name\n}\n\n// NotifyService is the interface for sending push notifications.\ntype NotifyService interface {\n\tSend(notification Notification) error\n}\n\n// Notification represents a push notification.\ntype Notification struct {\n\tTitle     string\n\tBody      string\n\tPriority  int\n\tTags      []string\n\tImage     []byte\n\tImageType string\n\tTimestamp time.Time\n}\n\n// NewScheduler creates a new briefing scheduler.\nfunc NewScheduler(gen *Generator, notify NotifyService, config SchedulerConfig) *Scheduler {\n\tif config.Time == \"\" {\n\t\tconfig.Time = \"07:00\" // Default 7 AM\n\t}\n\tif config.Timezone == \"\" {\n\t\tconfig.Timezone = \"Local\"\n\t}\n\n\treturn &Scheduler{\n\t\tgenerator:     gen,\n\t\tnotifyService: notify,\n\t\tconfig:        config,\n\t\tstopChan:      make(chan struct{}),\n\t}\n}\n\n// Start begins the scheduling loop.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) Start(ctx context.Context) {\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tif s.running {\n\t\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\ts.running = true\n\ts.mu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Start ticker to check every minute\n\ts.ticker = time.NewTicker(1 * time.Minute)\n\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tdefer s.ticker.Stop()\n\n\t\t// Initial check on start\n\t\ts.checkAndGenerate()\n\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-s.ticker.C:\n\t\t\t\ts.checkAndGenerate()\n\t\t\tcase <-s.stopChan:\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Briefing scheduler started (time: %s, push: %v)\",\n\t\ts.config.Time, s.config.PushNotification)\n}\n\n// Stop stops the scheduling loop.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) Stop() {\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n\n\tif !s.running {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\ts.running = false\n\tclose(s.stopChan)\n\n\tif s.ticker != nil {\n\t\ts.ticker.Stop()\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Briefing scheduler stopped\")\n}\n\n// SetConfig updates the scheduler configuration.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) SetConfig(config SchedulerConfig) {\n\ts.mu.Lock()\n\tdefer s.mu.Unlock()\n\n\toldConfig := s.config\n\ts.config = config\n\n\t// If time changed, reset ticker to trigger sooner\n\tif oldConfig.Time != config.Time {\n\t\tif s.ticker != nil {\n\t\t\ts.ticker.Reset(1 * time.Minute)\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// GetConfig returns the current configuration.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) GetConfig() SchedulerConfig {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer s.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn s.config\n}\n\n// checkAndGenerate checks if it's time to generate and send a briefing.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) checkAndGenerate() {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tconfig := s.config\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif !config.Enabled || !config.AutoGenerate {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Parse configured time\n\thour, minute, err := parseTime(config.Time)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to parse briefing time %q: %v\", config.Time, err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Get current time in configured timezone\n\tnow := s.nowInTimezone()\n\n\t// Check if we're at the configured time (within 1 minute window)\n\tif now.Hour() != hour || now.Minute() != minute {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Get today's date\n\tdate := now.Format(\"2006-01-02\")\n\n\t// Check if briefing was already generated today\n\tif !s.generator.ShouldGenerate(date, \"\") {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Briefing already generated for %s, skipping\", date)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Generate briefing\n\tb, err := s.generator.Generate(date, \"\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to generate briefing for %s: %v\", date, err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\t// Save briefing\n\tif err := s.generator.Save(b); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to save briefing for %s: %v\", date, err)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Morning briefing generated for %s\", date)\n\n\t// Send push notification if enabled\n\tif config.PushNotification && s.notifyService != nil {\n\t\ts.sendNotification(b)\n\t}\n}\n\n// sendNotification sends a push notification for the briefing.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) sendNotification(b *Briefing) {\n\tnotification := Notification{\n\t\tTitle:     \"Morning Briefing\",\n\t\tBody:      s.formatNotificationBody(b),\n\t\tPriority:  1, // Low priority for morning briefings\n\t\tTags:      []string{\"briefing\", \"morning\"},\n\t\tTimestamp: time.Now(),\n\t}\n\n\tif err := s.notifyService.Send(notification); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[ERROR] Failed to send briefing notification: %v\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Morning briefing notification sent for %s\", b.Date)\n\t}\n}\n\n// formatNotificationBody formats the briefing content for push notifications.\n// Truncates to a reasonable length for push notifications.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) formatNotificationBody(b *Briefing) string {\n\t// Use the first 200 characters of the briefing content\n\tmaxLen := 200\n\tcontent := b.Content\n\tif len(content) > maxLen {\n\t\tcontent = content[:maxLen] + \"...\"\n\t}\n\treturn content\n}\n\n// nowInTimezone returns the current time in the configured timezone.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) nowInTimezone() time.Time {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\ttimezone := s.config.Timezone\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif timezone == \"Local\" || timezone == \"\" {\n\t\treturn time.Now()\n\t}\n\n\tloc, err := time.LoadLocation(timezone)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to load timezone %q, using local time: %v\", timezone, err)\n\t\treturn time.Now()\n\t}\n\n\treturn time.Now().In(loc)\n}\n\n// parseTime parses a time string in HH:MM format.\nfunc parseTime(s string) (hour, minute int, err error) {\n\tvar h, m int\n\t_, err = fmt.Sscanf(s, \"%d:%d\", &h, &m)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid time format: %w\", err)\n\t}\n\tif h < 0 || h > 23 || m < 0 || m > 59 {\n\t\treturn 0, 0, fmt.Errorf(\"invalid time values: %d:%d\", h, m)\n\t}\n\treturn h, m, nil\n}\n\n// ShouldGenerateNow checks if a briefing should be generated at this moment.\n// This is useful for testing and manual triggers.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) ShouldGenerateNow() bool {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tconfig := s.config\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif !config.Enabled || !config.AutoGenerate {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\thour, minute, err := parseTime(config.Time)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\n\tnow := s.nowInTimezone()\n\treturn now.Hour() == hour && now.Minute() == minute\n}\n\n// TriggerNow manually triggers briefing generation and notification.\nfunc (s *Scheduler) TriggerNow(date string) error {\n\ts.mu.RLock()\n\tconfig := s.config\n\ts.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif date == \"\" {\n\t\tnow := providers\n29\t\tbleState        BLEState\n30\t\ttriggerState    TriggerState\n31\t\tsystemHealth    SystemHealthProvider\n32\t\tzoneState       ZoneStateProvider\n33\t\teventStore      EventStore\n34\t\tsecurityState   SecurityStateProvider\n35\t\tsleepState      SleepStateProvider\n36\t\tbriefingProvider BriefingProvider\n37\t\n38\t\t// Pending events buffer — events accumulated between 10 Hz delta ticks.\n39\t\tpendingEvents   []map[string]interface{}\n40\t\tpendingEventsMu sync.Mutex\n41\t\n42\t\t// Snapshot protocol: stores the last full snapshot for delta computation.\n43\t\t// Updated on every 10 Hz tick.\n44\t\tsnapMu sync.RWMutex\n45\t\tsnap   snapshotCache\n46\t\n47\t\t// Replay handler for time-travel debugging\n48\t\treplayHandler ReplayHandler\n49\t\n50\t\t// pendingExplainBlobIDs holds blob IDs for which dashboard clients have\n51\t\t// requested an ExplainabilitySnapshot via \"request_explain\" WebSocket messages.\n52\t\t// The fusion loop checks this and generates the snapshot on the next tick.\n53\t\tpendingExplainMu      sync.Mutex\n54\t\tpendingExplainBlobIDs map[int]bool\n55\t}\n56\t\n57\t// snapshotCache holds serialised JSON bytes for each snapshot field,\n58\t// allowing cheap byte-level comparison when computing deltas.\n59\ttype snapshotCache struct {\n60\t\tblobsJSON         []byte\n61\t\tnodesJSON         []byte\n62\t\tzonesJSON         []byte\n63\t\tportalsJSON       []byte\n64\t\tlinksJSON         []byte\n65\t\tbleJSON           []byte\n66\t\ttriggersJSON      []byte\n67\t\tmotionStatesJSON  []byte\n68\t\tsecurityJSON      []byte\n69\t\tconfidence        int\n70\t\ttimestampMs       int64\n71\t}\n72\t\n73\t// ZoneStateProvider is an interface to query zone data for the dashboard snapshot.\n74\ttype ZoneStateProvider interface {\n75\t\tGetAllZones() []ZoneSnapshot\n76\t\tGetAllPortals() []PortalSnapshot\n77\t\tGetOccupancy() map[string]ZoneOccupancySnapshot\n78\t\tGetOccupancyStatus() map[string]string\n79\t}\n80\t\n81\t// PortalSnapshot is the wire format for a portal in the dashboard snapshot.\n82\ttype PortalSnapshot struct {\n83\t\tID        string  `json:\"id\"`\n84\t\tName      string  `json:\"name\"`\n85\t\tZoneA     string  `json:\"zone_a\"`\n86\t\tZoneB     string  `json:\"zone_b\"`\n87\t\tP1X       float64 `json:\"p1_x\"`\n88\t\tP1Y       float64 `json:\"p1_y\"`\n89\t\tP1Z       float64 `json:\"p1_z\"`\n90\t\tP2X       float64 `json:\"p2_x\"`\n91\t\tP2Y       float64 `json:\"p2_y\"`\n92\t\tP2Z       float64 `json:\"p2_z\"`\n93\t\tP3X       float64 `json:\"p3_x\"`\n94\t\tP3Y       float64 `json:\"p3_y\"`\n95\t\tP3Z       float64 `json:\"p3_z\"`\n96\t\tNX        float64 `json:\"n_x\"`\n97\t\tNY        float64 `json:\"n_y\"`\n98\t\tNZ        float64 `json:\"n_z\"`\n99\t\tWidth     float64 `json:\"width\"`\n100\t\tHeight    float64 `json:\"height\"`\n101\t\tEnabled   bool    `json:\"enabled\"`\n102\t}\n103\t\n104\t// ZoneSnapshot is the wire format for a zone in the dashboard snapshot.\n105\ttype ZoneSnapshot struct {\n106\t\tID          string   `json:\"id\"`\n107\t\tName        string   `json:\"name\"`\n108\t\tCount       int      `json:\"count\"`\n109\t\tPeople      []string `json:\"people\"`\n110\t\tMinX        float64  `json:\"x\"`\n111\t\tMinY        float64  `json:\"y\"`\n112\t\tMinZ        float64  `json:\"z\"`\n113\t\tSizeX       float64  `json:\"w\"`\n114\t\tSizeY       float64  `json:\"d\"`\n115\t\tSizeZ       float64  `json:\"h\"`\n116\t\tOccStatus   string   `json:\"occ_status,omitempty\"` // \"uncertain\" or \"reconciled\"\n117\t}\n118\t\n119\t// ZoneOccupancySnapshot provides occupancy counts for zones.\n120\ttype ZoneOccupancySnapshot struct {\n121\t\tCount   int    `json:\"count\"`\n122\t\tBlobIDs []int  `json:\"blob_ids\"`\n123\t}\n124\t\n125\t// IngestionState is an interface to query error\n154\t}\n155\t\n156\t// SecurityStateProvider provides security mode state for the dashboard snapshot.\n157\ttype SecurityStateProvider interface {\n158\t\tIsSecurityModeActive()
