bool\n174\t}\n175\t\n176\t// ReplayHandler is the interface for replay engine operations.\n177\ttype ReplayHandler interface {\n178\t\tSeekTo(targetMS int64) error\n179\t\tPlay(speed float64) error\n180\t\tPause() error\n181\t\tSetParams(params *replay.TunableParams) error\n182\t\tApplyToLive() error\n183\t\tSetSpeed(speed float64) error\n184\t}\n185\t\n186\t// SetReplayHandler sets the replay handler for time-travel debugging.\n187\tfunc (h *Hub) SetReplayHandler(handler ReplayHandler) {\n188\t\th.mu.Lock()\n189\t\tdefer h.mu.Unlock()\n190\t\th.replayHandler = handler\n191\t}\n192\t\n193\t// ZoneChangeBroadcaster notifies dashboard clients when zones or portals\n194\t// are created, updated, or deleted via the REST API. Implementations should\n195\t// both send an immediate typed broadcast and invalidate the snapshot cache\n196\t// so the next delta tick doesn't send stale data.\n197\ttype ZoneChangeBroadcaster interface {\n198\t\tBroadcastZoneChange(action string, zone ZoneSnapshot)\n199\t\tBroadcastPortalChange(action string, portal PortalSnapshot)\n200\t}\n201\t\n202\t// Client represents a dashboard WebSocket client\n203\ttype Client struct {\n204\t\thub  *Hub\n205\t\tsend chan []byte\n206\t}\n207\t\n208\t// NewHub creates a new dashboard hub\n209\tfunc NewHub() *Hub {\n210\t\treturn &Hub{\n211\t\t\tclients:               make(map[*Client]struct{}),\n212\t\t\tbroadcast:             make(chan []byte, 256),\n213\t\t\tregister:              make(chan *Client),\n214\t\t\tunregister:            make(chan *Client),\n215\t\t\tpendingExplainBlobIDs: make(map[int]bool),\n216\t\t}\n217\t}\n218\t\n219\t// RequestExplain records that a dashboard client wants an ExplainabilitySnapshot\n220\t// for the given blobID. The snapshot will be broadcast on the next fusion tick.\n221\tfunc (h *Hub) RequestExplain(blobID int) {\n222\t\th.pendingExplainMu.Lock()\n223\t\th.pendingExplainBlobIDs[blobID] = true\n224\t\th.pendingExplainMu.Unlock()\n225\t}\n226\t\n227\t// ConsumeExplainRequests returns and clears the set of blob IDs pending explain\n228\t// snapshots. Called by the fusion loop each tick.\n229\tfunc (h *Hub) ConsumeExplainRequests() []int {\n230\t\th.pendingExplainMu.Lock()\n231\t\tdefer h.pendingExplainMu.Unlock()\n232\t\tif len(h.pendingExplainBlobIDs) == 0 {\n233\t\t\treturn nil\n234\t\t}\n235\t\tids := make([]int, 0, len(h.pendingExplainBlobIDs))\n236\t\tfor id := range h.pendingExplainBlobIDs {\n237\t\t\tids = append(ids, id)\n238\t\t}\n239\t\th.pendingExplainBlobIDs = make(map[int]bool)\n240\t\treturn ids\n241\t}\n242\t\n243\t// BroadcastExplainSnapshot broadcasts a \"blob_explain\" WebSocket message\n244\t// containing the ExplainabilitySnapshot for a blob.\n245\t//\n246\t// The snapshot is serialised from the provided data map and broadcast to all\n247\t// connected dashboard clients. The message format is:\n248\t//\n249\t//\t{\"type\":\"blob_explain\",\"blob_id\":N,\"snapshot\":{...}}\n250\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastExplainSnapshot(blobID int, snapshot interface{}) {\n251\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n252\t\t\t\"type\":     \"blob_explain\",\n253\t\t\t\"blob_id\":  blobID,\n254\t\t\t\"snapshot\": snapshot,\n255\t\t}\n256\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(msg)\n257\t\tif err != nil {\n258\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal blob_explain message: %v\", err)\n259\t\t\treturn\n260\t\t}\n261\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n262\t}\n263\t\n264\t// SetIngestionState sets the ingestion state provider\n265\tfunc (h *Hub) SetIngestionState(state IngestionState) {\n266\t\th.mu.Lock()\n267\t\th.ingestionState = state\n268\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n269\t}\n270\t\n271\t// SetBLEState sets the BLE state provider\n272\tfunc (h *Hub) SetBLEState(state BLEState) {\n273\t\th.mu.Lock()\n274\t\th.bleState = state\n275\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n276\t}\n277\t\n278\t// SetTriggerState sets the automation trigger state provider\n279\tfunc (h *Hub) SetTriggerState(state TriggerState) {\n280\t\th.mu.Lock()\n281\t\th.triggerState = state\n282\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n283\t}\n284\t\n285\t// SetSystemHealth sets the system health provider\n286\tfunc (h *Hub) SetSystemHealth(provider SystemHealthProvider) {\n287\t\th.mu.Lock()\n288\t\th.systemHealth = provider\n289\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n290\t}\n291\t\n292\t// SetEventStore sets the event persistence store\n293\tfunc (h *Hub) SetEventStore(store EventStore) {\n294\t\th.mu.Lock()\n295\t\th.eventStore = store\n296\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n297\t}\n298\t\n299\t// SetZoneState sets the zone state provider for snapshot broadcasts.\n300\tfunc (h *Hub) SetZoneState(state ZoneStateProvider) {\n301\t\th.mu.Lock()\n302\t\th.zoneState = state\n303\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n304\t}\n305\t\n306\t// SetSecurityState sets the security state provider for snapshot broadcasts.\n307\tfunc (h *Hub) SetSecurityState(state SecurityStateProvider) {\n308\t\th.mu.Lock()\n309\t\th.securityState = state\n310\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n311\t}\n312\t\n313\t// SetSleepState sets the sleep state provider for morning summary push.\n314\tfunc (h *Hub) SetSleepState(state SleepStateProvider) {\n315\t\th.mu.Lock()\n316\t\th.sleepState = state\n317\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n318\t}\n319\t\n320\t// SetBriefingProvider sets the briefing provider for morning briefing push.\n321\tfunc (h *Hub) SetBriefingProvider(provider BriefingProvider) {\n322\t\th.mu.Lock()\n323\t\th.briefingProvider = provider\n324\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n325\t}\n326\t\n327\t// Run starts the hub's main loop.\n328\t// The 10 Hz delta tick replaces the old 5 s state / 500 ms presence broadcasts.\n329\t// BLE scan results are broadcast every 5 s as a separate typed message.\n330\t// System health (60 s) is kept as a separate low-frequency broadcast.\n331\tfunc (h *Hub) Run() {\n332\t\t// 10 Hz snapshot/delta tick\n333\t\tdeltaTicker := time.NewTicker(100 * time.Millisecond)\n334\t\tdefer deltaTicker.Stop()\n335\t\n336\t\t// System health broadcast ticker (60 seconds) — kept separate\n337\t\thealthTicker := time.NewTicker(60 * time.Second)\n338\t\tdefer healthTicker.Stop()\n339\t\n340\t\t// BLE scan broadcast ticker (5 seconds)\n341\t\tbleScanTicker := time.NewTicker(5 * time.Second)\n342\t\tdefer bleScanTicker.Stop()\n343\t\n344\t\tfor {\n345\t\t\tselect {\n346\t\t\tcase client := <-h.register:\n347\t\t\t\t// Build and send snapshot BEFORE adding the client to the\n348\t\t\t\t// broadcast map so that no delta messages race ahead of the\n349\t\t\t\t// initial state.\n350\t\t\t\tsnap := h.buildSnapshot()\n351\t\t\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(snap)\n352\t\t\t\tif err != nil {\n353\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal snapshot: %v\", err)\n354\t\t\t\t} else {\n355\t\t\t\t\tselect {\n356\t\t\t\t\tcase client.send <- data:\n357\t\t\t\t\tdefault:\n358\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Snapshot dropped for new client (buffer full)\")\n359\t\t\t\t\t}\n360\t\t\t\t}\n361\t\n362\t\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n363\t\t\t\th.clients[client] = struct{}{}\n364\t\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n365\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Dashboard client connected (total: %d)\", len(h.clients))\n366\t\n367\t\t\t\t// Push morning briefing on first connection after 6am\n368\t\t\t\th.pushBriefingToClient(client)\n369\t\n370\t\t\tcase client := <-h.unregister:\n371\t\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n372\t\t\t\tif _, ok := h.clients[client]; ok {\n373\t\t\t\t\tdelete(h.clients, client)\n374\t\t\t\t\tclose(client.send)\n375\t\t\t\t}\n376\t\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n377\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Dashboard client disconnected (total: %d)\", len(h.clients))\n378\t\n379\t\t\tcase message := <-h.broadcast:\n380\t\t\t\th.mu.RLock()\n381\t\t\t\tfor client := range h.clients {\n382\t\t\t\t\tselect {\n383\t\t\t\t\tcase client.send <- message:\n384\t\t\t\t\tdefault:\n385\t\t\t\t\t\t// Client buffer full, skip\n386\t\t\t\t\t}\n387\t\t\t\t}\n388\t\t\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n389\t\n390\t\t\tcase <-deltaTicker.C:\n391\t\t\t\th.tickDelta()\n392\t\n393\t\t\tcase <-healthTicker.C:\n394\t\t\t\th.broadcastSystemHealth()\n395\t\n396\t\t\tcase <-bleScanTicker.C:\n397\t\t\t\th.broadcastBLEScan()\n398\t\t\t}\n399\t\t}\n400\t}\n401\t\n402\t// Register registers a new dashboard client\n403\tfunc (h *Hub) Register(client *Client) {\n404\t\th.register <- client\n405\t}\n406\t\n407\t// Unregister unregisters a dashboard client\n408\tfunc (h *Hub) Unregister(client *Client) {\n409\t\th.unregister <- client\n410\t}\n411\t\n412\t// Broadcast sends a message to all connected dashboard clients\n413\tfunc (h *Hub) Broadcast(message []byte) {\n414\t\tselect {\n415\t\tcase h.broadcast <- message:\n416\t\tdefault:\n417\t\t\t// Channel full, drop message\n418\t\t}\n419\t}\n420\t\n421\t// BroadcastCSI broadcasts a CSI frame to all dashboard clients\n422\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastCSI(nodeMAC, peerMAC string, data []byte) {\n423\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n424\t}\n425\t\n426\t// BroadcastNodeConnected notifies dashboards of a new node\n427\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastNodeConnected(mac, firmware, chip string, unpaired bool) {\n428\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n429\t\t\t\"type\":             \"node_connected\",\n430\t\t\t\"mac\":              mac,\n431\t\t\t\"firmware_version\": firmware,\n432\t\t\t\"chip\":             chip,\n433\t\t\t\"unpaired\":         unpaired,\n434\t\t}\n435\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n436\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n437\t}\n438\t\n439\t// BroadcastNodeDisconnected notifies dashboards of a node leaving\n440\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastNodeDisconnected(mac string) {\n441\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n442\t\t\t\"type\": \"node_disconnected\",\n443\t\t\t\"mac\":  mac,\n444\t\t}\n445\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n446\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n447\t}\n448\t\n449\t// BroadcastLinkActive notifies dashboards of an active link\n450\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLinkActive(linkID, nodeMAC, peerMAC string) {\n451\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n452\t\t\t\"type\":     \"link_active\",\n453\t\t\t\"id\":       linkID,\n454\t\t\t\"node_mac\": nodeMAC,\n455\t\t\t\"peer_mac\": peerMAC,\n456\t\t}\n457\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n458\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n459\t}\n460\t\n461\t// BroadcastLinkInactive notifies dashboards of an inactive link\n462\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLinkInactive(linkID string) {\n463\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n464\t\t\t\"type\": \"link_inactive\",\n465\t\t\t\"id\":   linkID,\n466\t\t}\n467\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n468\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n469\t}\n470\t\n471\t// BroadcastMotionState sends motion state for one or more links to all dashboard clients.\n472\t// Called on state changes (idle↔motion) so the dashboard updates immediately.\n473\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastMotionState(states []ingestion.MotionStateItem) {\n474\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n475\t\t\t\"type\":  \"motion_state\",\n476\t\t\t\"links\": states,\n477\t\t}\n478\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n479\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n480\t}\n481\t\n482\t// ─── Phase 3 Broadcasts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n483\t\n484\t// nodeJSON is the wire format for a fleet node sent to the dashboard.\n485\ttype nodeJSON struct {\n486\t\tMAC      string  `json:\"mac\"`\n487\t\tName     string  `json:\"name\"`\n488\t\tRole     string  `json:\"role\"`\n489\t\tPosX     float64 `json:\"pos_x\"`\n490\t\tPosY     float64 `json:\"pos_y\"`\n491\t\tPosZ     float64 `json:\"pos_z\"`\n492\t\tVirtual  bool    `json:\"virtual\"`\n493\t\tLastSeen int64   `json:\"last_seen_ms\"`\n494\t}\n495\t\n496\t// roomJSON is the wire format for room configuration.\n497\ttype roomJSON struct {\n498\t\tWidth   float64 `json:\"width\"`\n499\t\tDepth   float64 `json:\"depth\"`\n500\t\tHeight  float64 `json:\"height\"`\n501\t\tOriginX float64 `json:\"origin_x\"`\n502\t\tOriginZ float64 `json:\"origin_z\"`\n503\t}\n504\t\n505\t// BroadcastRegistryState sends updated node registry and room config to all dashboard clients.\n506\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastRegistryState(nodes []fleet.NodeRecord, room fleet.RoomConfig) {\n507\t\twireNodes := make([]nodeJSON, len(nodes))\n508\t\tfor i, n := range nodes {\n509\t\t\twireNodes[i] = nodeJSON{\n510\t\t\t\tMAC:      n.MAC,\n511\t\t\t\tName:     n.Name,\n512\t\t\t\tRole:     n.Role,\n513\t\t\t\tPosX:     n.PosX,\n514\t\t\t\tPosY:     n.PosY,\n515\t\t\t\tPosZ:     n.PosZ,\n516\t\t\t\tVirtual:  n.Virtual,\n517\t\t\t\tLastSeen: n.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n518\t\t\t}\n519\t\t}\n520\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n521\t\t\t\"type\":  \"registry_state\",\n522\t\t\t\"nodes\": wireNodes,\n523\t\t\t\"room\": roomJSON{\n524\t\t\t\tWidth:   room.Width,\n525\t\t\t\tDepth:   room.Depth,\n526\t\t\t\tHeight:  room.Height,\n527\t\t\t\tOriginX: room.OriginX,\n528\t\t\t\tOriginZ: room.OriginZ,\n529\t\t\t},\n530\t\t}\n531\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n532\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n533\t}\n534\t\n535\t// trailPoint is a compact [x, z] pair for JSON serialisation.\n536\ttype trailPoint [2]float64\n537\t\n538\t// blobJSON is the wire format for a tracked person blob.\n539\ttype blobJSON struct {\n540\t\tID                 int          `json:\"id\"`\n541\t\tX                  float64      `json:\"x\"`\n542\t\tZ                  float64      `json:\"z\"`\n543\t\tVX                 float64      `json:\"vx\"`\n544\t\tVZ                 float64      `json:\"vz\"`\n545\t\tWeight             float64      `json:\"weight\"`\n546\t\tTrail              []trailPoint `json:\"trail\"`\n547\t\tPosture            string       `json:\"posture,omitempty\"`\n548\t\tPersonID           string       `json:\"person_id,omitempty\"`\n549\t\tPersonLabel        string       `json:\"person_label,omitempty\"`\n550\t\tPersonColor        string       `json:\"person_color,omitempty\"`\n551\t\tIdentityConfidence float64      `json:\"identity_confidence,omitempty\"`\n552\t\tIdentitySource     string       `json:\"identity_source,omitempty\"`\n553\t\tReplay             bool         `json:\"replay\"` // true when blob is from time-travel replay\n554\t}\n555\t\n556\t// BroadcastLocUpdate sends localisation results to all dashboard clients.\n557\t// It also stores the latest blob data for the snapshot/delta protocol.\n558\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLocUpdate(blobs []tracking.Blob) {\n559\t\twireBlobs := make([]blobJSON, len(blobs))\n560\t\tfor i, b := range blobs {\n561\t\t\ttrail := make([]trailPoint, len(b.Trail))\n562\t\t\tfor j, pt := range b.Trail {\n563\t\t\t\ttrail[j] = trailPoint{pt[0], pt[1]}\n564\t\t\t}\n565\t\t\twireBlobs[i] = blobJSON{\n566\t\t\t\tID:                 b.ID,\n567\t\t\t\tX:                  b.X,\n568\t\t\t\tZ:                  b.Z,\n569\t\t\t\tVX:                 b.VX,\n570\t\t\t\tVZ:                 b.VZ,\n571\t\t\t\tWeight:             b.Weight,\n572\t\t\t\tTrail:              trail,\n573\t\t\t\tPosture:            string(b.Posture),\n574\t\t\t\tPersonID:           b.PersonID,\n575\t\t\t\tPersonLabel:        b.PersonLabel,\n576\t\t\t\tPersonColor:        b.PersonColor,\n577\t\t\t\tIdentityConfidence: b.IdentityConfidence,\n578\t\t\t\tIdentitySource:     b.IdentitySource,\n579\t\t\t}\n580\t\t}\n581\t\n582\t\t// Store for snapshot protocol.\n583\t\th.snapMu.Lock()\n584\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(wireBlobs); err == nil {\n585\t\t\th.snap.blobsJSON = data\n586\t\t}\n587\t\th.snapMu.Unlock()\n588\t\n589\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n590\t\t\t\"type\":  \"loc_update\",\n591\t\t\t\"blobs\": wireBlobs,\n592\t\t}\n593\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n594\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n595\t}\n596\t\n597\t// BroadcastCoverageMap sends the GDOP coverage map to all dashboard clients.\n598\t// data is a row-major float32 array of GDOP values, cols × rows cells.\n599\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastCoverageMap(data []float32, cols, rows int, cellSize float64, originX, originZ float64) {\n600\t\t// Encode as a compact flat array of float32 values (JSON).\n601\t\tvals := make([]float64, len(data))\n602\t\tfor i, v := range data {\n603\t\t\tvals[i] = float64(v)\n604\t\t}\n605\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n606\t\t\t\"type\":      \"coverage_map\",\n607\t\t\t\"cols\":      cols,\n608\t\t\t\"rows\":      rows,\n609\t\t\t\"cell_size\": cellSize,\n610\t\t\t\"origin_x\":  originX,\n611\t\t\t\"origin_z\":  originZ,\n612\t\t\t\"data\":      vals,\n613\t\t}\n614\t\tencoded, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n615\t\th.Broadcast(encoded)\n616\t}\n617\t\n618\tfunc (h *Hub) sendInitialState(client *Client) {\n619\t\t// Legacy path kept for tests that call sendInitialState directly.\n620\t\t// The Run() loop now handles snapshot delivery on register.\n621\t\tsnap := h.buildSnapshot()\n622\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(snap)\n623\t\tselect {\n624\t\tcase client.send <- data:\n625\t\tdefault:\n626\t\t}\n627\t}\n628\t\n629\t// buildSnapshot constructs the full snapshot message for a new client connection.\n630\tfunc (h *Hub) buildSnapshot() map[string]interface{} {\n631\t\tnow := time.Now().UnixMilli()\n632\t\tsnap := map[string]interface{}{\n633\t\t\t\"type\":         \"snapshot\",\n634\t\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": now,\n635\t\t}\n636\t\n637\t\th.mu.RLock()\n638\t\ting := h.ingestionState\n639\t\tble := h.bleState\n640\t\ttrig := h.triggerState\n641\t\tzones := h.zoneState\n642\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n643\t\n644\t\tif ing != nil {\n645\t\t\tif nodes := ing.GetConnectedNodesInfo(); len(nodes) > 0 {\n646\t\t\t\tsnap[\"nodes\"] = nodes\n647\t\t\t}\n648\t\t\tif links := ing.GetAllLinksInfo(); len(links) > 0 {\n649\t\t\t\tsnap[\"links\"] = links\n650\t\t\t}\n651\t\t\tif motionStates := ing.GetAllMotionStates(); len(motionStates) > 0 {\n652\t\t\t\tsnap[\"motion_states\"] = motionStates\n653\t\t\t}\n654\t\t}\n655\t\n656\t\tif ble != nil {\n657\t\t\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n658\t\t\t\tsnap[\"ble_devices\"] = devices\n659\t\t\t}\n660\t\t}\n661\t\n662\t\tif trig != nil {\n663\t\t\tif triggers := trig.GetTriggerStates(); len(triggers) > 0 {\n664\t\t\t\tsnap[\"triggers\"] = triggers\n665\t\t\t}\n666\t\t}\n667\t\n668\t\tif zones != nil {\n669\t\t\tsnap[\"zones\"] = h.buildZoneSnapshots(zones)\n670\t\t\tif portals := zones.GetAllPortals(); len(portals) > 0 {\n671\t\t\t\tsnap[\"portals\"] = portals\n672\t\t\t}\n673\t\t}\n674\t\n675\t\t// Include latest blobs from the snapshot cache.\n676\t\th.snapMu.RLock()\n677\t\tif len(h.snap.blobsJSON) > 0 {\n678\t\t\tvar blobs []blobJSON\n679\t\t\tif json.Unmarshal(h.snap.blobsJSON, &blobs) == nil {\n680\t\t\t\tsnap[\"blobs\"] = blobs\n681\t\t\t}\n682\t\t}\n683\t\th.snapMu.RUnlock()\n684\t\n685\t\treturn snap\n686\t}\n687\t\n688\t// buildZoneSnapshots converts zone state into the wire format for the snapshot.\n689\tfunc (h *Hub) buildZoneSnapshots(zp ZoneStateProvider) []ZoneSnapshot {\n690\t\tzones := zp.GetAllZones()\n691\t\toccupancy := zp.GetOccupancy()\n692\t\tstatusMap := zp.GetOccupancyStatus()\n693\t\tresult := make([]ZoneSnapshot, 0, len(zones))\n694\t\tfor _, z := range zones {\n695\t\t\tocc, ok := occupancy[z.ID]\n696\t\t\tpeople := make([]string, 0)\n697\t\t\tif ok {\n698\t\t\t\t_ = occ.BlobIDs\n699\t\t\t}\n700\t\t\toccStatus := statusMap[z.ID]\n701\t\t\tsnap := ZoneSnapshot{\n702\t\t\t\tID:     z.ID,\n703\t\t\t\tName:   z.Name,\n704\t\t\t\tCount:  occ.Count,\n705\t\t\t\tPeople: people,\n706\t\t\t\tMinX:   z.MinX,\n707\t\t\t\tMinY:   z.MinY,\n708\t\t\t\tMinZ:   z.MinZ,\n709\t\t\t\tSizeX:  z.SizeX,\n710\t\t\t\tSizeY:  z.SizeY,\n711\t\t\t\tSizeZ:  z.SizeZ,\n712\t\t\t}\n713\t\t\tif occStatus == \"uncertain\" {\n714\t\t\t\tsnap.OccStatus = \"uncertain\"\n715\t\t\t}\n716\t\t\tresult = append(result, snap)\n717\t\t}\n718\t\treturn result\n719\t}\n720\t\n721\t// tickDelta is called every 100 ms (10 Hz). It computes which snapshot\n722\t// fields changed since the last tick and broadcasts only those fields.\n723\t// Delta messages omit the \"type\" field so the frontend can distinguish\n724\t// them from event-driven messages.\n725\tfunc (h *Hub) tickDelta() {\n726\t\th.mu.RLock()\n727\t\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n728\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n729\t\n730\t\tif clientCount == 0 {\n731\t\t\treturn\n732\t\t}\n733\t\n734\t\tnow := time.Now().UnixMilli()\n735\t\tdelta := make(map[string]interface{})\n736\t\tdelta[\"timestamp_ms\"] = now\n737\t\n738\t\th.mu.RLock()\n739\t\ting := h.ingestionState\n740\t\tble := h.bleState\n741\t\ttrig := h.triggerState\n742\t\tzones := h.zoneState\n743\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n744\t\n745\t\t// --- blobs (stored by BroadcastLocUpdate) ---\n746\t\th.snapMu.Lock()\n747\t\tif ing != nil {\n748\t\t\tif nodes := ing.GetConnectedNodesInfo(); len(nodes) > 0 {\n749\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(nodes); err == nil {\n750\t\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.nodesJSON) {\n751\t\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"nodes\"] = nodes\n752\t\t\t\t\t\th.snap.nodesJSON = data\n753\t\t\t\t\t}\n754\t\t\t\t}\n755\t\t\t} else {\n756\t\t\t\tif len(h.snap.nodesJSON) > 0 {\n757\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"nodes\"] = []ingestion.NodeInfo{}\n758\t\t\t\t\th.snap.nodesJSON = nil\n759\t\t\t\t}\n760\t\t\t}\n761\t\n762\t\t\tif links := ing.GetAllLinksInfo(); len(links) > 0 {\n763\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(links); err == nil {\n764\t\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.linksJSON) {\n765\t\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"links\"] = links\n766\t\t\t\t\t\th.snap.linksJSON = data\n767\t\t\t\t\t}\n768\t\t\t\t}\n769\t\t\t} else {\n770\t\t\t\tif len(h.snap.linksJSON) > 0 {\n771\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"links\"] = []ingestion.LinkInfo{}\n772\t\t\t\t\th.snap.linksJSON = nil\n773\t\t\t\t}\n774\t\t\t}\n775\t\n776\t\t\tif motionStates := ing.GetAllMotionStates(); len(motionStates) > 0 {\n777\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(motionStates); err == nil {\n778\t\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.motionStatesJSON) {\n779\t\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"motion_states\"] = motionStates\n780\t\t\t\t\t\th.snap.motionStatesJSON = data\n781\t\t\t\t\t}\n782\t\t\t\t}\n783\t\t\t}\n784\t\t}\n785\t\n786\t\tif len(h.snap.blobsJSON) > 0 {\n787\t\t\tdelta[\"blobs\"] = json.RawMessage(h.snap.blobsJSON)\n788\t\t}\n789\t\n790\t\tif ble != nil {\n791\t\t\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n792\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(devices); err == nil {\n793\t\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.bleJSON) {\n794\t\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"ble_devices\"] = devices\n795\t\t\t\t\t\th.snap.bleJSON = data\n796\t\t\t\t\t}\n797\t\t\t\t}\n798\t\t\t}\n799\t\t}\n800\t\n801\t\tif trig != nil {\n802\t\t\tif triggers := trig.GetTriggerStates(); len(triggers) > 0 {\n803\t\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(triggers); err == nil {\n804\t\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.triggersJSON) {\n805\t\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"triggers\"] = triggers\n806\t\t\t\t\t\th.snap.triggersJSON = data\n807\t\t\t\t\t}\n808\t\t\t\t}\n809\t\t\t}\n810\t\t}\n811\t\n812\t\tif zones != nil {\n813\t\t\tzs := h.buildZoneSnapshots(zones)\n814\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(zs); err == nil {\n815\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.zonesJSON) {\n816\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"zones\"] = zs\n817\t\t\t\t\th.snap.zonesJSON = data\n818\t\t\t\t}\n819\t\t\t}\n820\t\n821\t\t\tps := zones.GetAllPortals()\n822\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(ps); err == nil {\n823\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.portalsJSON) {\n824\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"portals\"] = ps\n825\t\t\t\t\th.snap.portalsJSON = data\n826\t\t\t\t}\n827\t\t\t}\n828\t\t}\n829\t\n830\t\th.snap.timestampMs = now\n831\t\th.snapMu.Unlock()\n832\t\n833\t\t// Include any pending events that arrived since the last tick.\n834\t\th.pendingEventsMu.Lock()\n835\t\tif len(h.pendingEvents) > 0 {\n836\t\t\tdelta[\"events\"] = h.pendingEvents\n837\t\t\th.pendingEvents = nil\n838\t\t}\n839\t\th.pendingEventsMu.Unlock()\n840\t\n841\t\t// Only broadcast if something actually changed (beyond timestamp).\n842\t\tif len(delta) <= 1 {\n843\t\t\treturn\n844\t\t}\n845\t\n846\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(delta)\n847\t\tif err != nil {\n848\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal delta: %v\", err)\n849\t\t\treturn\n850\t\t}\n851\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n852\t}\n853\t\n854\t// bytesEqual compares two byte slices. Nil and empty are treated as equal.\n855\tfunc bytesEqual(a, b []byte) bool {\n856\t\tif len(a) == 0 && len(b) == 0 {\n857\t\t\treturn true\n858\t\t}\n859\t\tif len(a) != len(b) {\n860\t\t\treturn false\n861\t\t}\n862\t\tfor i := range a {\n863\t\t\tif a[i] != b[i] {\n864\t\t\t\treturn false\n865\t\t\t}\n866\t\t}\n867\t\treturn true\n868\t}\n869\t\n870\t// ClientCount returns the number of connected dashboard clients\n871\tfunc (h *Hub) ClientCount() int {\n872\t\th.mu.RLock()\n873\t\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n874\t\treturn len(h.clients)\n875\t}\n876\t\n877\t// broadcastSystemHealth broadcasts system health stats to all dashboard clients.\n878\tfunc (h *Hub) broadcastSystemHealth() {\n879\t\th.mu.RLock()\n880\t\tprovider := h.systemHealth\n881\t\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n882\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n883\t\n884\t\tif provider == nil || clientCount == 0 {\n885\t\t\treturn\n886\t\t}\n887\t\n888\t\th.BroadcastSystemHealth(\n889\t\t\tprovider.GetUptimeSeconds(),\n890\t\t\tprovider.GetNodeCount(),\n891\t\t\tprovider.GetBeadCount(),\n892\t\t\tprovider.GetGoRoutineCount(),\n893\t\t\tprovider.GetMemoryMB(),\n894\t\t)\n895\t}\n896\t\n897\t// broadcastBLEScan broadcasts the current BLE device list to all dashboard clients.\n898\t// Called every 5 seconds when devices are present.\n899\tfunc (h *Hub) broadcastBLEScan() {\n900\t\th.mu.RLock()\n901\t\tble := h.bleState\n902\t\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n903\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n904\t\n905\t\tif ble == nil || clientCount == 0 {\n906\t\t\treturn\n907\t\t}\n908\t\n909\t\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n910\t\t\th.BroadcastBLEScan(devices)\n911\t\t}\n912\t}\n913\t\n914\t// BroadcastFleetChange broadcasts a fleet change event to all dashboard clients.\n915\t// This implements the fleet.FleetChangeBroadcaster interface.\n916\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastFleetChange(event fleet.FleetChangeEvent) {\n917\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n918\t\t\t\"type\":              \"fleet_change\",\n919\t\t\t\"timestamp\":         event.Timestamp.UnixMilli(),\n920\t\t\t\"trigger_reason\":    event.TriggerReason,\n921\t\t\t\"mean_gdop_before\":  event.MeanGDOPBefore,\n922\t\t\t\"mean_gdop_after\":   event.MeanGDOPAfter,\n923\t\t\t\"coverage_before\":   event.CoverageBefore,\n924\t\t\t\"coverage_after\":    event.CoverageAfter,\n925\t\t\t\"coverage_delta\":    event.CoverageDelta,\n926\t\t\t\"is_degradation\":    event.IsDegradation,\n927\t\t\t\"role_assignments\":  event.RoleAssignments,\n928\t\t}\n929\t\n930\t\tif event.OfflineMAC != \"\" {\n931\t\t\tmsg[\"offline_mac\"] = event.OfflineMAC\n932\t\t}\n933\t\tif event.RecoveredMAC != \"\" {\n934\t\t\tmsg[\"recovered_mac\"] = event.RecoveredMAC\n935\t\t}\n936\t\tif event.WarningMessage != \"\" {\n937\t\t\tmsg[\"warning_message\"] = event.WarningMessage\n938\t\t}\n939\t\tif len(event.GDOPBefore) > 0 {\n940\t\t\tmsg[\"gdop_before\"] = floatsToSlice(event.GDOPBefore)\n941\t\t\tmsg[\"gdop_after\"] = floatsToSlice(event.GDOPAfter)\n942\t\t\tmsg[\"gdop_cols\"] = event.GDOPCols\n943\t\t\tmsg[\"gdop_rows\"] = event.GDOPRows\n944\t\t}\n945\t\n946\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n947\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n948\t}\n949\t\n950\t// floatsToSlice converts []float32 to []float64 for JSON marshalling\n951\tfunc floatsToSlice(f []float32) []float64 {\n952\t\tresult := make([]float64, len(f))\n953\t\tfor i, v := range f {\n954\t\t\tresult[i] = float64(v)\n955\t\t}\n956\t\treturn result\n957\t}\n958\t\n959\t// BroadcastFleetHealth broadcasts current fleet health status.\n960\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastFleetHealth(nodes []fleet.NodeRecord, roles map[string]string, coverageScore float64) {\n961\t\ttype nodeHealth struct {\n962\t\t\tMAC         string  `json:\"mac\"`\n963\t\t\tName        string  `json:\"name\"`\n964\t\t\tRole        string  `json:\"role\"`\n965\t\t\tHealthScore float64 `json:\"health_score\"`\n966\t\t\tOnline      bool    `json:\"online\"`\n967\t\t}\n968\t\n969\t\twireNodes := make([]nodeHealth, len(nodes))\n970\t\tfor i, n := range nodes {\n971\t\t\trole := n.Role\n972\t\t\tif r, ok := roles[n.MAC]; ok {\n973\t\t\t\trole = r\n974\t\t\t}\n975\t\t\twireNodes[i] = nodeHealth{\n976\t\t\t\tMAC:         n.MAC,\n977\t\t\t\tName:        n.Name,\n978\t\t\t\tRole:        role,\n979\t\t\t\tHealthScore: n.HealthScore,\n980\t\t\t\tOnline:      n.LastSeenAt.After(time.Now().Add(-5 * time.Minute)),\n981\t\t\t}\n982\t\t}\n983\t\n984\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n985\t\t\t\"type\":           \"fleet_health\",\n986\t\t\t\"nodes\":          wireNodes,\n987\t\t\t\"coverage_score\": coverageScore,\n988\t\t}\n989\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n990\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n991\t}\n992\t\n993\t// BroadcastFleetHistory broadcasts optimisation history to dashboard.\n994\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastFleetHistory(history []fleet.OptimisationHistoryRecord) {\n995\t\ttype historyEntry struct {\n996\t\t\tID              int64   `json:\"id\"`\n997\t\t\tTimestamp       int64   `json:\"timestamp_ms\"`\n998\t\t\tTriggerReason   string  `json:\"trigger_reason\"`\n999\t\t\tMeanGDOPBefore  float64 `json:\"mean_gdop_before\"`\n1000\t\t\tMeanGDOPAfter   float64 rec.TriggerReason,\n1010\t\t\t\tMeanGDOPBefore: rec.MeanGDOPBefore,\n1011\t\t\t\tMeanGDOPAfter:  rec.MeanGDOPAfter,\n1012\t\t\t\tCoverageDelta: := json.Marshal(msg)\n1021\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n1022\t}\n1023\t\n1024\t// FleetChangeEvent is re-exported for compatibility\n1025\ttype FleetChangeEvent = fleet.FleetChangeEvent\n1026\t\n1027\t// BroadcastSystemModeChange broadcasts a system mode change event to all dashboard clients.\n1028\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastSystemModeChange(event interface{}) {\n1029\t\tmsg := BroadcastAnomaly broadcasts an anomaly detection event to all dashboard clients.\n1038\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastAnomaly(anomaly interface{}) {\n1039\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n1040\t\t\t\"type\": \"anomaly_detected\",\n1041\t\t\t\"data\": anomaly,\n1042\t\t}\n1043\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n1044\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n1045\t}\n1046\t\n1047\t// BroadcastEvent broadcasts an event (presence transition, zone entry/exit, portal crossing) to all dashboard clients.\n1048\t// It also persists the event to the database and buffers it for inclusion in the next incremental update.\n1049\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastEvent(eventID string, timestamp time.Time, kind, zone string, blobID int, personName string) {\n1050\t\tevt := map[string]interface{}{\n1051\t\t\t\"id\":          eventID,\n1052\t\t\t\"ts\":          timestamp.UnixMilli(),\n1053\t\t\t\"kind\":        kind,\n1054\t\t\t\"zone\":        zone,\n1055\t\t\t\"blob_id\":     blobID,\n1056\t\t\t\"person_name\": personName,\n1057\t\t}\n1058\t\n1059\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n1060\t\t\t\"type\":  \"event\",\n1061\t\t\t\"event\": evt,\n1062\t\t}\n1063\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n1064\t\th.Broadcast(data)\n1065\t\n1066\t\t// Buffer for inclusion in the next incremental update.\n1067\t\th.pendingEventsMu.Lock()\n1068\t\th.pendingEvents = append(h.pendingEvents, evt)\n1069\t\t// Keep buffer bounded to prevent unbounded growth.\n1070\t\tif len(h.pendingEvents) > 100 {\n1071\t\t\th.pendingEvents = h.pendingEvents[len(h.pendingEvents)-50:]\n1072\t\t}\n1073\t\th.pendingEventsMu.Unlock()\n1074\t\n1075\t\t// Persist to database if store is configured.\n1076\t\th.mu.RLock()\n1077\t\tstore := h.eventStore\n1078\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n1079\t\tif store != nil {\n1080\t\t\tgo func() {\n1081\t\t\t\tif err := store.LogEvent(kind, timestamp, zone, personName, blobID, \"\", \"info\"); err != nil {\n1082\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to persist event %s: %v\", eventID, err)\n1083\t\t\t\t}\n1084\t\t\t}()\n1085\t\t}\n1086\t}\n1087\t\n1088\t// BroadcastAlert broadcasts an alert (anomaly detection, security mode trigger) to all dashboard clients.\n1089\tfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastAlert(alertID string, timestamp time.Time, severity, description Implementations should\n// both send an immediate typed broadcast and invalidate the snapshot cache\n// so the next delta tick doesn't send stale data.\ntype ZoneChangeBroadcaster interface {\n\tBroadcastZoneChange(action string, zone ZoneSnapshot)\n\tBroadcastPortalChange(action string, portal PortalSnapshot)\n}\n\n// Client represents a dashboard WebSocket client\ntype Client struct {\n\thub  *Hub\n\tsend chan []byte\n}\n\n// NewHub creates a new dashboard hub\nfunc NewHub() *Hub {\n\treturn &Hub{\n\t\tclients:               make(map[*Client]struct{}),\n\t\tbroadcast:             make(chan []byte, 256),\n\t\tregister:              make(chan *Client),\n\t\tunregister:            make(chan *Client),\n\t\tpendingExplainBlobIDs: make(map[int]bool),\n\t}\n}\n\n// RequestExplain records that a dashboard client wants an ExplainabilitySnapshot\n// for the given blobID. The snapshot will be broadcast on the next fusion tick.\nfunc (h *Hub) RequestExplain(blobID int) {\n\th.pendingExplainMu.Lock()\n\th.pendingExplainBlobIDs[blobID] = true\n\th.pendingExplainMu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// ConsumeExplainRequests returns and clears the set of blob IDs pending explain\n// snapshots. Called by the fusion loop each tick.\nfunc (h *Hub) ConsumeExplainRequests() []int {\n\th.pendingExplainMu.Lock()\n\tdefer h.pendingExplainMu.Unlock()\n\tif len(h.pendingExplainBlobIDs) == 0 {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tids := make([]int, 0, len(h.pendingExplainBlobIDs))\n\tfor id := range h.pendingExplainBlobIDs {\n\t\tids = append(ids, id)\n\t}\n\th.pendingExplainBlobIDs = make(map[int]bool)\n\treturn ids\n}\n\n// BroadcastExplainSnapshot broadcasts a \"blob_explain\" WebSocket message\n// containing the ExplainabilitySnapshot for a blob.\n//\n// The snapshot is serialised from the provided data map and broadcast to all\n// connected dashboard clients. The message format is:\n//\n//\t{\"type\":\"blob_explain\",\"blob_id\":N,\"snapshot\":{...}}\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastExplainSnapshot(blobID int, snapshot interface{}) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":     \"blob_explain\",\n\t\t\"blob_id\":  blobID,\n\t\t\"snapshot\": snapshot,\n\t}\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(msg)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal blob_explain message: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// SetIngestionState sets the ingestion state provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetIngestionState(state IngestionState) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.ingestionState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetBLEState sets the BLE state provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetBLEState(state BLEState) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.bleState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetTriggerState sets the automation trigger state provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetTriggerState(state TriggerState) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.triggerState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetSystemHealth sets the system health provider\nfunc (h *Hub) SetSystemHealth(provider SystemHealthProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.systemHealth = provider\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetEventStore sets the event persistence store\nfunc (h *Hub) SetEventStore(store EventStore) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.eventStore = store\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetZoneState sets the zone state provider for snapshot broadcasts.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetZoneState(state ZoneStateProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.zoneState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetSecurityState sets the security state provider for snapshot broadcasts.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetSecurityState(state SecurityStateProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.securityState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetSleepState sets the sleep state provider for morning summary push.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetSleepState(state SleepStateProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.sleepState = state\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// SetBriefingProvider sets the briefing provider for morning briefing push.\nfunc (h *Hub) SetBriefingProvider(provider BriefingProvider) {\n\th.mu.Lock()\n\th.briefingProvider = provider\n\th.mu.Unlock()\n}\n\n// Run starts the hub's main loop.\n// The 10 Hz delta tick replaces the old 5 s state / 500 ms presence broadcasts.\n// BLE scan results are broadcast every 5 s as a separate typed message.\n// System health (60 s) is kept as a separate low-frequency broadcast.\nfunc (h *Hub) Run() {\n\t// 10 Hz snapshot/delta tick\n\tdeltaTicker := time.NewTicker(100 * time.Millisecond)\n\tdefer deltaTicker.Stop()\n\n\t// System health broadcast ticker (60 seconds) — kept separate\n\thealthTicker := time.NewTicker(60 * time.Second)\n\tdefer healthTicker.Stop()\n\n\t// BLE scan broadcast ticker (5 seconds)\n\tbleScanTicker := time.NewTicker(5 * time.Second)\n\tdefer bleScanTicker.Stop()\n\n\tfor {\n\t\tselect {\n\t\tcase client := <-h.register:\n\t\t\t// Build and send snapshot BEFORE adding the client to the\n\t\t\t// broadcast map so that no delta messages race ahead of the\n\t\t\t// initial state.\n\t\t\tsnap := h.buildSnapshot()\n\t\t\tdata, err := json.Marshal(snap)\n\t\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal snapshot: %v\", err)\n\t\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\t\tcase client.send <- data:\n\t\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Snapshot dropped for new client (buffer full)\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\n\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\th.clients[client] = struct{}{}\n\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Dashboard client connected (total: %d)\", len(h.clients))\n\n\t\t\t// Push morning briefing on first connection after 6am\n\t\t\th.pushBriefingToClient(client)\n\n\t\tcase client := <-h.unregister:\n\t\t\th.mu.Lock()\n\t\t\tif _, ok := h.clients[client]; ok {\n\t\t\t\tdelete(h.clients, client)\n\t\t\t\tclose(client.send)\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\th.mu.Unlock()\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Dashboard client disconnected (total: %d)\", len(h.clients))\n\n\t\tcase message := <-h.broadcast:\n\t\t\th.mu.RLock()\n\t\t\tfor client := range h.clients {\n\t\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\t\tcase client.send <- message:\n\t\t\t\tdefault:\n\t\t\t\t\t// Client buffer full, skip\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\t\tcase <-deltaTicker.C:\n\t\t\th.tickDelta()\n\n\t\tcase <-healthTicker.C:\n\t\t\th.broadcastSystemHealth()\n\n\t\tcase <-bleScanTicker.C:\n\t\t\th.broadcastBLEScan()\n\t\t}\n\t}\n}\n\n// Register registers a new dashboard client\nfunc (h *Hub) Register(client *Client) {\n\th.register <- client\n}\n\n// Unregister unregisters a dashboard client\nfunc (h *Hub) Unregister(client *Client) {\n\th.unregister <- client\n}\n\n// Broadcast sends a message to all connected dashboard clients\nfunc (h *Hub) Broadcast(message []byte) {\n\tselect {\n\tcase h.broadcast <- message:\n\tdefault:\n\t\t// Channel full, drop message\n\t}\n}\n\n// BroadcastCSI broadcasts a CSI frame to all dashboard clients\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastCSI(nodeMAC, peerMAC string, data []byte) {\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastNodeConnected notifies dashboards of a new node\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastNodeConnected(mac, firmware, chip string, unpaired bool) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":             \"node_connected\",\n\t\t\"mac\":              mac,\n\t\t\"firmware_version\": firmware,\n\t\t\"chip\":             chip,\n\t\t\"unpaired\":         unpaired,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastNodeDisconnected notifies dashboards of a node leaving\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastNodeDisconnected(mac string) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\": \"node_disconnected\",\n\t\t\"mac\":  mac,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastLinkActive notifies dashboards of an active link\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLinkActive(linkID, nodeMAC, peerMAC string) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":     \"link_active\",\n\t\t\"id\":       linkID,\n\t\t\"node_mac\": nodeMAC,\n\t\t\"peer_mac\": peerMAC,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastLinkInactive notifies dashboards of an inactive link\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLinkInactive(linkID string) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\": \"link_inactive\",\n\t\t\"id\":   linkID,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastMotionState sends motion state for one or more links to all dashboard clients.\n// Called on state changes (idle↔motion) so the dashboard updates immediately.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastMotionState(states []ingestion.MotionStateItem) {\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":  \"motion_state\",\n\t\t\"links\": states,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// ─── Phase 3 Broadcasts ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n// nodeJSON is the wire format for a fleet node sent to the dashboard.\ntype nodeJSON struct {\n\tMAC      string  `json:\"mac\"`\n\tName     string  `json:\"name\"`\n\tRole     string  `json:\"role\"`\n\tPosX     float64 `json:\"pos_x\"`\n\tPosY     float64 `json:\"pos_y\"`\n\tPosZ     float64 `json:\"pos_z\"`\n\tVirtual  bool    `json:\"virtual\"`\n\tLastSeen int64   `json:\"last_seen_ms\"`\n}\n\n// roomJSON is the wire format for room configuration.\ntype roomJSON struct {\n\tWidth   float64 `json:\"width\"`\n\tDepth   float64 `json:\"depth\"`\n\tHeight  float64 `json:\"height\"`\n\tOriginX float64 `json:\"origin_x\"`\n\tOriginZ float64 `json:\"origin_z\"`\n}\n\n// BroadcastRegistryState sends updated node registry and room config to all dashboard clients.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastRegistryState(nodes []fleet.NodeRecord, room fleet.RoomConfig) {\n\twireNodes := make([]nodeJSON, len(nodes))\n\tfor i, n := range nodes {\n\t\twireNodes[i] = nodeJSON{\n\t\t\tMAC:      n.MAC,\n\t\t\tName:     n.Name,\n\t\t\tRole:     n.Role,\n\t\t\tPosX:     n.PosX,\n\t\t\tPosY:     n.PosY,\n\t\t\tPosZ:     n.PosZ,\n\t\t\tVirtual:  n.Virtual,\n\t\t\tLastSeen: n.LastSeenAt.UnixMilli(),\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":  \"registry_state\",\n\t\t\"nodes\": wireNodes,\n\t\t\"room\": roomJSON{\n\t\t\tWidth:   room.Width,\n\t\t\tDepth:   room.Depth,\n\t\t\tHeight:  room.Height,\n\t\t\tOriginX: room.OriginX,\n\t\t\tOriginZ: room.OriginZ,\n\t\t},\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// trailPoint is a compact [x, z] pair for JSON serialisation.\ntype trailPoint [2]float64\n\n// blobJSON is the wire format for a tracked person blob.\ntype blobJSON struct {\n\tID                 int          `json:\"id\"`\n\tX                  float64      `json:\"x\"`\n\tZ                  float64      `json:\"z\"`\n\tVX                 float64      `json:\"vx\"`\n\tVZ                 float64      `json:\"vz\"`\n\tWeight             float64      `json:\"weight\"`\n\tTrail              []trailPoint `json:\"trail\"`\n\tPosture            string       `json:\"posture,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonID           string       `json:\"person_id,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonLabel        string       `json:\"person_label,omitempty\"`\n\tPersonColor        string       `json:\"person_color,omitempty\"`\n\tIdentityConfidence float64      `json:\"identity_confidence,omitempty\"`\n\tIdentitySource     string       `json:\"identity_source,omitempty\"`\n\tReplay             bool         `json:\"replay\"` // true when blob is from time-travel replay\n}\n\n// BroadcastLocUpdate sends localisation results to all dashboard clients.\n// It also stores the latest blob data for the snapshot/delta protocol.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastLocUpdate(blobs []tracking.Blob) {\n\twireBlobs := make([]blobJSON, len(blobs))\n\tfor i, b := range blobs {\n\t\ttrail := make([]trailPoint, len(b.Trail))\n\t\tfor j, pt := range b.Trail {\n\t\t\ttrail[j] = trailPoint{pt[0], pt[1]}\n\t\t}\n\t\twireBlobs[i] = blobJSON{\n\t\t\tID:                 b.ID,\n\t\t\tX:                  b.X,\n\t\t\tZ:                  b.Z,\n\t\t\tVX:                 b.VX,\n\t\t\tVZ:                 b.VZ,\n\t\t\tWeight:             b.Weight,\n\t\t\tTrail:              trail,\n\t\t\tPosture:            string(b.Posture),\n\t\t\tPersonID:           b.PersonID,\n\t\t\tPersonLabel:        b.PersonLabel,\n\t\t\tPersonColor:        b.PersonColor,\n\t\t\tIdentityConfidence: b.IdentityConfidence,\n\t\t\tIdentitySource:     b.IdentitySource,\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Store for snapshot protocol.\n\th.snapMu.Lock()\n\tif data, err := json.Marshal(wireBlobs); err == nil {\n\t\th.snap.blobsJSON = data\n\t}\n\th.snapMu.Unlock()\n\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":  \"loc_update\",\n\t\t\"blobs\": wireBlobs,\n\t}\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// BroadcastCoverageMap sends the GDOP coverage map to all dashboard clients.\n// data is a row-major float32 array of GDOP values, cols × rows cells.\nfunc (h *Hub) BroadcastCoverageMap(data []float32, cols, rows int, cellSize float64, originX, originZ float64) {\n\t// Encode as a compact flat array of float32 values (JSON).\n\tvals := make([]float64, len(data))\n\tfor i, v := range data {\n\t\tvals[i] = float64(v)\n\t}\n\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":      \"coverage_map\",\n\t\t\"cols\":      cols,\n\t\t\"rows\":      rows,\n\t\t\"cell_size\": cellSize,\n\t\t\"origin_x\":  originX,\n\t\t\"origin_z\":  originZ,\n\t\t\"data\":      vals,\n\t}\n\tencoded, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\th.Broadcast(encoded)\n}\n\nfunc (h *Hub) sendInitialState(client *Client) {\n\t// Legacy path kept for tests that call sendInitialState directly.\n\t// The Run() loop now handles snapshot delivery on register.\n\tsnap := h.buildSnapshot()\n\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(snap)\n\tselect {\n\tcase client.send <- data:\n\tdefault:\n\t}\n}\n\n// buildSnapshot constructs the full snapshot message for a new client connection.\nfunc (h *Hub) buildSnapshot() map[string]interface{} {\n\tnow := time.Now().UnixMilli()\n\tsnap := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\"type\":         \"snapshot\",\n\t\t\"timestamp_ms\": now,\n\t}\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\ting := h.ingestionState\n\tble := h.bleState\n\ttrig := h.triggerState\n\tzones := h.zoneState\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif ing != nil {\n\t\tif nodes := ing.GetConnectedNodesInfo(); len(nodes) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"nodes\"] = nodes\n\t\t}\n\t\tif links := ing.GetAllLinksInfo(); len(links) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"links\"] = links\n\t\t}\n\t\tif motionStates := ing.GetAllMotionStates(); len(motionStates) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"motion_states\"] = motionStates\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif ble != nil {\n\t\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"ble_devices\"] = devices\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif trig != nil {\n\t\tif triggers := trig.GetTriggerStates(); len(triggers) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"triggers\"] = triggers\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif zones != nil {\n\t\tsnap[\"zones\"] = h.buildZoneSnapshots(zones)\n\t\tif portals := zones.GetAllPortals(); len(portals) > 0 {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"portals\"] = portals\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Include latest blobs from the snapshot cache.\n\th.snapMu.RLock()\n\tif len(h.snap.blobsJSON) > 0 {\n\t\tvar blobs []blobJSON\n\t\tif json.Unmarshal(h.snap.blobsJSON, &blobs) == nil {\n\t\t\tsnap[\"blobs\"] = blobs\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\th.snapMu.RUnlock()\n\n\treturn snap\n}\n\n// buildZoneSnapshots converts zone state into the wire format for the snapshot.\nfunc (h *Hub) buildZoneSnapshots(zp ZoneStateProvider) []ZoneSnapshot {\n\tzones := zp.GetAllZones()\n\toccupancy := zp.GetOccupancy()\n\tstatusMap := zp.GetOccupancyStatus()\n\tresult := make([]ZoneSnapshot, 0, len(zones))\n\tfor _, z := range zones {\n\t\tocc, ok := occupancy[z.ID]\n\t\tpeople := make([]string, 0)\n\t\tif ok {\n\t\t\t_ = occ.BlobIDs\n\t\t}\n\t\toccStatus := statusMap[z.ID]\n\t\tsnap := ZoneSnapshot{\n\t\t\tID:     z.ID,\n\t\t\tName:   z.Name,\n\t\t\tCount:  occ.Count,\n\t\t\tPeople: people,\n\t\t\tMinX:   z.MinX,\n\t\t\tMinY:   z.MinY,\n\t\t\tMinZ:   z.MinZ,\n\t\t\tSizeX:  z.SizeX,\n\t\t\tSizeY:  z.SizeY,\n\t\t\tSizeZ:  z.SizeZ,\n\t\t}\n\t\tif occStatus == \"uncertain\" {\n\t\t\tsnap.OccStatus = \"uncertain\"\n\t\t}\n\t\tresult = append(result, snap)\n\t}\n\treturn result\n}\n\n// tickDelta is called every 100 ms (10 Hz). It computes which snapshot\n// fields changed since the last tick and broadcasts only those fields.\n// Delta messages omit the \"type\" field so the frontend can distinguish\n// them from event-driven messages.\nfunc (h *Hub) tickDelta() {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif clientCount == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tnow := time.Now().UnixMilli()\n\tdelta := make(map[string]interface{})\n\tdelta[\"timestamp_ms\"] = now\n\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\ting := h.ingestionState\n\tble := h.bleState\n\ttrig := h.triggerState\n\tzones := h.zoneState\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\t// --- blobs (stored by BroadcastLocUpdate) ---\n\th.snapMu.Lock()\n\tif ing != nil {\n\t\tif nodes := ing.GetConnectedNodesInfo(); len(nodes) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(nodes); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.nodesJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"nodes\"] = nodes\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.nodesJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif len(h.snap.nodesJSON) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"nodes\"] = []ingestion.NodeInfo{}\n\t\t\t\th.snap.nodesJSON = nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif links := ing.GetAllLinksInfo(); len(links) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(links); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.linksJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"links\"] = links\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.linksJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tif len(h.snap.linksJSON) > 0 {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"links\"] = []ingestion.LinkInfo{}\n\t\t\t\th.snap.linksJSON = nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tif motionStates := ing.GetAllMotionStates(); len(motionStates) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(motionStates); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.motionStatesJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"motion_states\"] = motionStates\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.motionStatesJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif len(h.snap.blobsJSON) > 0 {\n\t\tdelta[\"blobs\"] = json.RawMessage(h.snap.blobsJSON)\n\t}\n\n\tif ble != nil {\n\t\tif devices := ble.GetCurrentDevices(); len(devices) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(devices); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.bleJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"ble_devices\"] = devices\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.bleJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif trig != nil {\n\t\tif triggers := trig.GetTriggerStates(); len(triggers) > 0 {\n\t\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(triggers); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.triggersJSON) {\n\t\t\t\t\tdelta[\"triggers\"] = triggers\n\t\t\t\t\th.snap.triggersJSON = data\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tif zones != nil {\n\t\tzs := h.buildZoneSnapshots(zones)\n\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(zs); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.zonesJSON) {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"zones\"] = zs\n\t\t\t\th.snap.zonesJSON = data\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tps := zones.GetAllPortals()\n\t\tif data, err := json.Marshal(ps); err == nil {\n\t\t\tif !bytesEqual(data, h.snap.portalsJSON) {\n\t\t\t\tdelta[\"portals\"] = ps\n\t\t\t\th.snap.portalsJSON = data\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\th.snap.timestampMs = now\n\th.snapMu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Include any pending events that arrived since the last tick.\n\th.pendingEventsMu.Lock()\n\tif len(h.pendingEvents) > 0 {\n\t\tdelta[\"events\"] = h.pendingEvents\n\t\th.pendingEvents = nil\n\t}\n\th.pendingEventsMu.Unlock()\n\n\t// Only broadcast if something actually changed (beyond timestamp).\n\tif len(delta) <= 1 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\tdata, err := json.Marshal(delta)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to marshal delta: %v\", err)\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\th.Broadcast(data)\n}\n\n// bytesEqual compares two byte slices. Nil and empty are treated as equal.\nfunc bytesEqual(a, b []byte) bool {\n\tif len(a) == 0 && len(b) == 0 {\n\t\treturn true\n\t}\n\tif len(a) != len(b) {\n\t\treturn false\n\t}\n\tfor i := range a {\n\t\tif a[i] != b[i] {\n\t\t\treturn false\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\treturn true\n}\n\n// ClientCount returns the number of connected dashboard clients\nfunc (h *Hub) ClientCount() int {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tdefer h.mu.RUnlock()\n\treturn len(h.clients)\n}\n\n// broadcastSystemHealth broadcasts system health stats to all dashboard clients.\nfunc (h *Hub) broadcastSystemHealth() {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tprovider := h.systemHealth\n\tclientCount := len(h.clients)\n\th.mu.RUnlock()\n\n\tif provider == nil || clientCount == 0 {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\n\th.BroadcastSystemHealth(\n\t\tprovider.GetUptimeSeconds(),\n\t\tprovider.GetNodeCount(),\n\t\tprovider.GetBeadCount(),\n\t\tprovider.GetGoRoutineCount(),\n\t\tprovider.GetMemoryMB(),\n\t)\n}\n\n// broadcastBLEScan broadcasts the current BLE device list to all dashboard clients.\n// Called every 5 seconds when devices are present.\nfunc (h *Hub) broadcastBLEScan() {\n\th.mu.RLock()\n\tble := *mqttClientAdapter) PublishSystemHealthDiscovery() error {\n\treturn a.client.PublishSystemHealthDiscovery()\n}\nfunc (a *mqttClientAdapter) PublishSystemModeDiscovery() error {\n\treturn a.client.PublishSystemModeDiscovery()\n}\nfunc (a *mqttClientAdapter) RemovePersonDiscovery(personID string) error {\n\treturn a.client.RemovePersonDiscovery(personID)\n}\nfunc (a *mqttClientAdapter) RemoveZoneDiscovery(zoneID string) error {\n\treturn a.client.RemoveZoneDiscovery(zoneID)\n}\nfunc (a *mqttClientAdapter) UpdateConfig(ctx context.Context, cfg interface{}) error {\n\t// Convert map[string]interface{} to mqtt.Config fields\n\tm, ok := cfg.(map[string]interface{})\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn nil\n\t}\n\tcurrent := a.client.GetConfig()\n\tif v, ok := m[\"broker\"].(string); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.Broker = v\n\t}\n\tif v, ok := m[\"username\"].(string); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.Username = v\n\t}\n\tif v, ok := m[\"password\"].(string); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.Password = v\n\t}\n\tif v, ok := m[\"tls\"].(bool); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.TLS = v\n\t}\n\tif v, ok := m[\"discovery_prefix\"].(string); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.DiscoveryPrefix = v\n\t}\n\tif v, ok := m[\"mothership_id\"].(string); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.MothershipID = v\n\t}\n\treturn a.client.UpdateConfig(ctx, current)\n}\n\n// webhookPublisherAdapter wraps *webhook.Publisher to satisfy the api.WebhookPublisher interface.\ntype webhookPublisherAdapter struct {\n\tpublisher *webhook.Publisher\n}\n\nfunc (a *webhookPublisherAdapter) GetConfig() interface{} { return a.publisher.GetConfig() }\nfunc (a *webhookPublisherAdapter) TestWebhook() error     { return a.publisher.TestWebhook() }\nfunc (a *webhookPublisherAdapter) UpdateConfig(cfg interface{}) {\n\tm, ok := cfg.(map[string]interface{})\n\tif !ok {\n\t\treturn\n\t}\n\tcurrent := a.publisher.GetConfig()\n\tif v, ok := m[\"url\"].(string); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.URL = v\n\t}\n\tif v, ok := m[\"enabled\"].(bool); ok {\n\t\tcurrent.Enabled = v\n\t}\n\ta.publisher.UpdateConfig(current)\n}\n\nfunc main() {\n\t// Load and validate configuration at startup\n\tcfg, err := appconfig.Load()\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\t// Log each validation error and exit with code 1\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[FATAL] Configuration validation failed:\")\n\t\tfor _, line := range splitLines(err.Error()) {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[FATAL]   %s\", line)\n\t\t}\n\t\tos.Exit(1)\n\t}\n\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Spaxel mothership v%s starting\", version)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Config: bind=%s data=%s static=%s mdns=%s\", cfg.BindAddr, cfg.DataDir, cfg.StaticDir, cfg.MDNSName)\n\n\t// Wrap all startup in a 30-second timeout context\n\tstartupCtx, startupCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), startup.TotalTimeout)\n\tdefer startupCancel()\n\n\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(startupCtx)\n\tdefer cancel()\n\n\tstartupTotalStart := time.Now()\n\n\tvar explainabilityHandler *explainability.Handler\n\n\tsigChan := make(chan os.Signal, 1)\n\tsignal.Notify(sigChan, syscall.SIGTERM, syscall.SIGINT)\n\n\tr := chi.NewRouter()\n\tr.Use(middleware.Logger)\n\tr.Use(middleware.Recoverer)\n\n\t// Phases 1–4: Database initialization (data dir, SQLite, migrations, secrets)\n\t// Each phase is logged with timing by db.OpenDB via the startup package.\n\t// The startup context is passed so all phases share the same 30s deadline.\n\tmainDB, err := db.OpenDB(startupCtx, cfg.DataDir, \"spaxel.db\")\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Fatalf(\"[FATAL] Failed to open main database: %v\", err)\n\t}\n\tdefer closeQuietly(mainDB)\n\tstartup.CheckTimeout(startupCtx)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Main database at %s\", filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"spaxel.db\"))\n\n\t// Events timeline handler (created early so fusion loop can log detection events)\n\teventsHandler := api.NewEventsHandlerFromDB(mainDB)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Events handler initialized (shared DB)\")\n\n\t// Timeline storage subscriber: reads from EventBus and writes to SQLite asynchronously\n\t// using a 1000-event buffered queue with drop-oldest behavior on overflow.\n\t_ = timeline.New(mainDB)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Timeline storage subscriber started\")\n\n\t// Auth is handled at the Traefik layer (Google OAuth) — no in-app PIN auth.\n\n\t// Create load shedder — single source of truth for load shedding state\n\tshedder := loadshed.New()\n\n\t// Create ingestion server\n\tingestSrv := ingestion.NewServer()\n\tr.HandleFunc(\"/ws/node\", ingestSrv.HandleNodeWS)\n\tingestSrv.SetShedder(shedder)\n\n\t// Signal processing pipeline\n\tpm := sigproc.NewProcessorManager(sigproc.ProcessorManagerConfig{\n\t\tNSub:       64,\n\t\tFusionRate: 10.0,\n\t\tTau:        30.0,\n\t})\n\tingestSrv.SetProcessorManager(pm)\n\n\t// Wire up health checker with all dependencies (after pm is created)\n\thealthChecker := health.New(health.Config{\n\t\tDB:           mainDB,\n\t\tGetNodeCount: func() int { return len(ingestSrv.GetConnectedNodes()) },\n\t\tShedder:      shedder,\n\t})\n\tr.Get(\"/healthz\", healthChecker.Handler(version))\n\n\t// Phase 6: Auth REST API (PIN-based dashboard authentication)\n\tauthHandler, err := auth.NewHandler(auth.Config{DB: mainDB})\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to create auth handler: %v\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tauthHandler.RegisterRoutes(r)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Auth API registered at /api/auth/*\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Phase 6: Settings REST API\n\tsettingsHandler := api.NewSettingsHandler(mainDB)\n\tsettingsHandler.RegisterRoutes(r)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Settings API registered at /api/settings\")\n\n\t\t// Note: Doctor API is registered after mdnsServer initialization\n\n\t// Phase 6: Integration Settings REST API (MQTT + system webhook)\n\t// Note: mqttClient and webhookPublisher are wired below after they are initialized.\n\tintegrationSettingsHandler := api.NewIntegrationSettingsHandler(mainDB, \"\")\n\tintegrationSettingsHandler.RegisterRoutes(r)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Integration settings API registered at /api/settings/integration\")\n\n\t// Phase 6: Notification Settings REST API\n\tnotificationSettingsHandler := api.NewNotificationSettingsHandler(mainDB)\n\tnotificationSettingsHandler.RegisterRoutes(r)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Notification settings API registered at /api/settings/notifications\")\n\n\t// Phase 6: Notifications REST API (channels, preview, test)\n\tnotificationsHandler, err := api.NewNotificationsHandler(filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"notifications.db\"))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to create notifications handler: %v\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tdefer notificationsHandler.Close()\n\t\tnotificationsHandler.RegisterRoutes(r)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Notifications API registered at /api/notifications/*\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Phase 6: Feature discovery notifications\n\t// Notifier manages one-time feature discovery notifications with quiet hours support\n\tfeatureNotifier, err := featurehelp.NewNotifier(mainDB)\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to create feature notifier: %v\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\t// Load quiet hours from settings\n\t\tsettings := settingsHandler.Get()\n\t\tif err := featureNotifier.LoadQuietHoursFromSettings(settings); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[DEBUG] Failed to load quiet hours for feature notifications: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Register feature notification API routes\n\t\tfeatureNotifier.RegisterRoutes(r)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Feature discovery notifications API registered at /api/help/*\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Feature monitor checks for feature availability and fires notifications\n\t// Checkers functions will be defined later after all components are initialized\n\tvar featureMonitor *featurehelp.FeatureMonitor\n\tif featureNotifier != nil {\n\t\tfeatureMonitor = featurehelp.NewFeatureMonitor(featurehelp.FeatureMonitorConfig{\n\t\t\tDB:            mainDB,\n\t\t\tNotifier:      featureNotifier,\n\t\t\tCheckInterval: 5 * time.Minute, // Check every 5 minutes\n\t\t})\n\n\t\t// Start the monitor (checkers will be wired below)\n\t\tfeatureMonitor.Start()\n\t\tdefer featureMonitor.Stop()\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Feature discovery monitor started\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Guided troubleshooting manager (for proactive contextual help)\n\t// Will be created after fleet manager is initialized\n\tvar guidedMgr *guidedtroubleshoot.Manager\n\n\t// Replay recording store - use recording.Buffer wrapped with replay adapter\n\tvar replayStore replay.FrameReader\n\tif err := os.MkdirAll(cfg.DataDir, 0755); err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to create data dir %s: %v\", cfg.DataDir, err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tbuf, err := recording.NewBuffer(filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"csi_replay.bin\"), cfg.ReplayMaxMB, 0)\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to open recording buffer: %v (CSI recording disabled)\", err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\t// Wrap with replay adapter so it can be used by replay worker\n\t\t\tadapter := replay.NewBufferAdapter(buf)\n\t\t\treplayStore = adapter\n\t\t\tingestSrv.SetReplayStore(adapter)\n\t\t\tdefer closeQuietly(buf)\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] CSI recording buffer at %s (%d MB max, retention=%v)\",\n\t\t\t\tfilepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"csi_replay.bin\"), cfg.ReplayMaxMB, buf.Retention())\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Phase 6: CSI Replay REST API\n\tvar replayHandler *api.ReplayHandler\n\tif replayStore != nil {\n\t\treplayHandler, err = later after dashboardHub is initialized.\n\t\t\tdefer replayHandler.Stop()\n\t\t\treplayHandler.RegisterRoutes(r)\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Replay REST API registered at /api/replay/*\")\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Per-link CSI recorder\n\trecorderDir := filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"csi\")\n\trecMgr, err := recorder.NewManager(recorder.DefaultConfig(recorderDir))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to create recorder: %v (per-link recording disabled)\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tingestSrv.SetRecorder(recMgr)\n\t\tdefer closeQuietly(recMgr)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Per-link CSI recorder at %s (retention=%dh, max=%dMB/link)\",\n\t\t\trecorderDir, recorder.DefaultConfig(recorderDir).RetentionHours,\n\t\t\trecorder.DefaultConfig(recorderDir).MaxBytesPerLink/1<<20)\n\t}\n\n\t// Fleet node registry\n\tfleetReg, err := closeQuietly(fleetReg)\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Fleet registry at %s\", filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"fleet.db\"))\n\n\t// Phase 5: Subsystems — start all managers with 5s per-subsystem timeout\n\tstartup.CheckTimeout(startupCtx)\n\tphase5Done := startup.Phase(5, \"Subsystems\")\n\n\t// Phase 5: BLE device registry\n\tvar bleRegistry *ble.Registry\n\tif err := Phase 6: Sleep quality monitor\n\tsleepMonitor := sleep.NewMonitor(sleep.MonitorConfig{\n\t\tSampleInterval: 30 * time.Second,\n\t\tReportHour:     7,  // Generate reports at 7 AM\n\t\tSleepStartHour: 22, // 10 PM\n\t\tSleepEndHour:   7,  // 7 AM\n\t})\n\tsleepMonitor.SetProcessorManager(pm)\n\tsleepMonitor.SetZoneManager(zonesMgr)\n\n\t// Sleep handler (created early so callback can reference closeQuietly(briefingHandler)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Morning briefing handler initialized\")\n\t}\n\n\tsleepMonitor.SetReportCallback(func(linkID string, report *sleep.SleepReport) {\n\t\t// Broadcast sleep report to dashboard\n\t\tmsg := map[string]interface{}{\n\t\t\t\"type\":           \"sleep_report\",\n\t\t\t\"link_id\":        linkID,\n\t\t\t\"session_date\":   report.SessionDate.Format(\"2006-01-02\"),\n\t\t\t\"overall_score\":  report.Metrics.OverallScore,\n\t\t\t\"quality_rating\": report.Metrics.QualityRating,\n\t\t\t\"generated_at\":   report.GeneratedAt.Unix(),\n\t\t}\n\t\tdata, _ := json.Marshal(msg)\n\t\tif dashboardHub != nil {\n\t\t\tdashboardHub.Broadcast(data)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Persist sleep record to main DB (for GET /api/sleep endpoint)\n\t\tperson := sleepMonitor.GetAnalyzer().GetSession(linkID)\n\t\tpersonName := linkID\n\t\tif person != nil {\n\t\t\tpersonName = person.GetPersonID()\n\t\t}\n\t\tif personName == \"\" {\n\t\t\tpersonName = linkID\n\t\t}\n\t\tif err := sleepHandler.SaveRecord(personName, report); err != nil { log.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to save sleep record: %v\", err) }\n\n\t\t// Send notification for morning report\n\t\tbody := fmt.Sprintf(\"Sleep quality: %s (%.0f/100)\", report.Metrics.QualityRating, report.Metrics.OverallScore)\n\t\tif report.Metrics.BreathingAnomaly {\n\t\t\tbody = fmt.Sprintf(\"Breathing rate elevated (%.0f bpm vs. %.0f bpm average). %s\",\n\t\t\t\treport.Metrics.AvgBreathingRate, report.Metrics.PersonalAvgBPM, body)\n\t\t}\n\t\tif notifyService != nil {\n\t\t\tnotif := notify.Notification{\n\t\t\t\tTitle:    \"Sleep Report\",\n\t\t\t\tBody:     body,\n\t\t\t\tPriority: 2,\n\t\t\t\tTags:     []string{\"sleep\", \"morning\"},\n\t\t\t\tData:     report.ToJSONMap(),\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tnotifyService.Send(notif) //nolint:errcheck\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Sleep report for %s: score=%.1f rating=%s breathing_avg=%.1f anomaly=%v\",\n\t\t\tlinkID, report.Metrics.OverallScore, report.Metrics.QualityRating,\n\t\t\treport.Metrics.AvgBreathingRate, report.Metrics.BreathingAnomaly)\n\t})\n\tsleepMonitor.Start()\n\tdefer sleepMonitor.Stop()\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Sleep quality monitor started (window: 22:00-07:00, report at 07:00)\")\n\n\t// Phase 6: Morning summary broadcast checker\n\t// Periodically checks if morning summary should be pushed to dashboard\n\tgo func() {\n\t\tticker := time.NewTicker(60 * time.Second) // Check every minute\n\t\tdefer ticker.Stop()\n\t\tfor {\n\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t\tif ok, summary := sleepMonitor.ShouldPushMorningSummary(); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\tif dashboardHub != nil {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tdashboardHub.BroadcastMorningSummary(summary)\n\t\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Morning summary broadcast: link=%s date=%s score=%.0f\",\n\t\t\t\t\t\t\tsummary[\"link_id\"], summary[\"session_date\"], summary[\"overall_score\"])\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\t}()\n\n\t// Phase 6: Prediction module for presence prediction\n\tvar predictionStore *prediction.ModelStore\n\tvar predictionHistory *prediction.HistoryUpdater\n\tvar predictionPredictor *prediction.Predictor\n\tvar predictionAccuracy *prediction.AccuracyTracker\n\tvar predictionHorizon *prediction.HorizonPredictor\n\tpredictionStore, err = prediction.NewModelStore(filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"prediction.db\"))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to open prediction store: %v\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tdefer closeQuietly(predictionStore)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Prediction store at %s\", filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"prediction.db\"))\n\n\t\t// Create history updater\n\t\tpredictionHistory = prediction.NewHistoryUpdater(predictionStore)\n\n\t\t// Load stored person zone positions\n\t\tif err := predictionHistory.LoadStoredPositions(); err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to load stored prediction positions: %v\", err)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Create accuracy tracker\n\t\tpredictionAccuracy, err = prediction.NewAccuracyTracker(filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"prediction_accuracy.db\"))\n\t\tif err != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to open accuracy tracker: %v\", err)\n\t\t} else {\n\t\t\tdefer closeQuietly(predictionAccuracy)\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Prediction accuracy tracker at %s\", filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"prediction_accuracy.db\"))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Create predictor\n\t\tpredictionPredictor = prediction.NewPredictor(predictionStore)\n\n\t\t// Create horizon predictor with Monte Carlo simulation\n\t\tif predictionAccuracy != nil {\n\t\t\tpredictionHorizon = prediction.NewHorizonPredictor(predictionStore, predictionAccuracy)\n\t\t\tpredictionHorizon.SetHorizon(prediction.PredictionHorizon)\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Horizon predictor initialized (%dm horizon, 1000 Monte Carlo runs)\",\n\t\t\t\tint(prediction.PredictionHorizon.Minutes()))\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Presence prediction initialized\")\n\t}\n\n\t// Phase 6: Notification service\n\tnotifyService, err = closeQuietly(notifyService)\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Notification service at %s\", filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"notify.db\"))\n\n\t\t// Set room config provider for floor plan thumbnails\n\t\tnotifyService.SetRoomConfig(&fleetRoomConfigAdapter{reg: fleetReg})\n\n\t\t// Wire notification settings handler with notify service for test *briefing.Scheduler\n\tif briefingHandler != nil {\n\t\t// Create notify adapter\n\t\tvar notifyAdapter briefing.NotifyService\n\t\tif notifyService != nil {\n\t\t\tnotifyAdapter = briefing.NewNotifyAdapter(notifyService)\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Load briefing settings from database or use defaults\n\t\tschedulerConfig := briefing.SchedulerConfig{\n\t\t\tEnabled:          true,\n\t\t\tTime:             \"07:00\",\n\t\t\tPushNotification: false,\n\t\t\tAutoGenerate:     true,\n\t\t\tTimezone:         cfg.Timezone,\n\t\t}\n\n\t\t// Try to load settings from database\n\t\tif mainDB != nil {\n\t\t\tvar settingsJSON sql.NullString\n\t\t\terr := mainDB.QueryRow(\"SELECT value_json FROM settings WHERE key = 'briefing_config'\").Scan(&settingsJSON)\n\t\t\tif err == nil && settingsJSON.Valid {\n\t\t\t\tvar savedConfig map[string]interface{}\n\t\t\t\tif err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(settingsJSON.String), &savedConfig); err == nil {\n\t\t\t\t\tif enabled, ok := savedConfig[\"enabled\"].(bool); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tschedulerConfig.Enabled = enabled\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif timeStr, ok := savedConfig[\"time\"].(string); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tschedulerConfig.Time = timeStr\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif push, ok := savedConfig[\"push_notification\"].(bool); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tschedulerConfig.PushNotification = push\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tif auto, ok := savedConfig[\"auto_generate\"].(bool); ok {\n\t\t\t\t\t\tschedulerConfig.AutoGenerate = auto\n\t\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Loaded briefing settings from database\")\n\t\t\t\t}\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t}\n\n\t\tbriefingScheduler = briefing.NewScheduler(briefingHandler.GetGenerator(), notifyAdapter, schedulerConfig)\n\t\tbriefingScheduler.Start(ctx)\n\t\tdefer briefingScheduler.Stop()\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Morning briefing scheduler started (time: %s, push: %v)\",\n\t\t\tschedulerConfig.Time, schedulerConfig.PushNotification)\n\t}\n\n\t// Phase 6: Self-improving localization system\n\tvar selfImprovingLocalizer *localization.SelfImprovingLocalizer\n\tvar weightStore *localization.WeightStore\n\n\t// Get room configuration from fleet registry\n\troomWidth := 10.0\n\troomDepth := 10.0\n\toriginX := 0.0\n\toriginZ := 0.0\n\tif fleetReg != nil {\n\t\troom, roomErr := fleetReg.GetRoom()\n\t\tif roomErr == nil && room != nil {\n\t\t\troomWidth = room.Width\n\t\t\troomDepth = room.Depth\n\t\t\toriginX = room.OriginX\n\t\t\toriginZ = room.OriginZ\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\tsilConfig := localization.DefaultSelfImprovingLocalizerConfig()\n\tsilConfig.RoomWidth = roomWidth\n\tsilConfig.RoomDepth = roomDepth\n\tsilConfig.OriginX = originX\n\tsilConfig.OriginZ = originZ\n\tsilConfig.AdjustmentInterval = 10 * time.Second\n\n\tselfImprovingLocalizer = localization.NewSelfImprovingLocalizer(silConfig)\n\n\t// Load persisted weights\n\tweightStore, err = localization.NewWeightStore(filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"weights.db\"))\n\tif err != nil {\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to open weight store: %v (learning persistence disabled)\", err)\n\t} else {\n\t\tdefer closeQuietly(weightStore)\n\t\tsavedWeights, loadErr := weightStore.LoadWeights()\n\t\tif loadErr != nil {\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[WARN] Failed to load saved weights: %v\", loadErr)\n\t\t} else if savedWeights != nil {\n\t\t\tselfImprovingLocalizer.GetEngine().SetLearnedWeights(savedWeights)\n\t\t\tstats := savedWeights.GetAllStats()\n\t\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Loaded %d saved link weights from weight store\", len(stats))\n\t\t}\n\t}\n\n\t// Set node positions from fleet registry\n\tif fleetReg != nil {\n\t\tnodes, _ := fleetReg.GetAllNodes()\n\t\tfor _, node := range nodes system\n\tselfImprovingLocalizer.Start()\n\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Self-improving localization started (room: %.1fx%.1fm, interval: %v)\",\n\t\troomWidth, roomDepth, silConfig.AdjustmentInterval)\n\n\t// Phase 6: Ground truth store for self-improving localization weights\n\tvar groundTruthStore *localization.GroundTruthStore\n\tvar spatialWeightLearner *localization.SpatialWeightLearner\n\tvar groundTruthCollector *localization.GroundTruthCollector\n\n\tgroundTruthStore, err = localization.NewGroundTruthStore(\n\t\tfilepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, = groundTruthStore.Close() }()\n\t\tlog.Printf(\"[INFO] Ground truth store at %s\", filepath.Join(cfg.DataDir, \"groundtruth.db\"))\n\n\t\t// Create spatial weight learner\n\t\tspatialWeightLearner, FleetNotifier\n\tguidedMgr = guidedtroubleshoot.NewManager(guidedtroubleshoot.ManagerConfig{\n\t\tCheckInterval: 5 * time.Minute,\n\t\tGetAllZones: func() ([]guidedtroubleshoot.ZoneInfo, error) {\n\t\t\tif zonesMgr == nil {\n\t\t\t\treturn nil, nil\n\t\t\t}\n\t\t\tallZones := zonesMgr.GetAllZones()\n\t\t\tvar result []guidedtroubleshoot.ZoneInfo\n\t\t\tfor i, z := range allZones {\n\t\t\tdashboardHub.Broadcast(data)\n\t\t}\n\t})\n\tguidedMgr.SetOnCalibrationComplete(func(zoneID int, qualityBefore, qualityAfter float64) {\n\t\t// Send WebSocket event to dashboard\n\t\tmsg := {\n\t\t\t\tselect {\n\t\t\t\tcase <-ctx.Done():\n\t\t\t\t\treturn\n\t\t\t\tcase <-ticker.C:\n\t\t\t\t\tif zonesMgr.IsReconciled() broadcasts\n\tingestSrv.SetDashboardBroadcaster(dashboardHub)\n\tingestSrv.SetMotionBroadcaster(dashboardHub)\n\tingestSrv.SetEventBroadcaster(dashboardHub)\n\n\t// Wire replay handler with dashboard load-shedding level changes to dashboard alerts and node rate push\n\tshedder.SetPreviousRate(20) // default rate before any Level 3 event\n\tshedder.SetRatePushCallback(func(rateHz int) {\n\t\tfor _,
